title: ServiceNow Developer på B3 Now
description:
Är du en vass ServiceNow-utvecklare som vill vara med och forma framtiden i ett snabbväxande specialistbolag?
   

  

**B3 Now** 
 är en del av B3 Consulting Group och ett av koncernens nyare specialistbolag med fullt fokus på ServiceNow. Här arbetar du i en start-up-liknande miljö där energi, innovation och nyfikenhet präglar vardagen. Hos oss bygger du moderna applikationer, utvecklar smarta lösningar och skapar verkligt affärsvärde för våra kunder.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som
 **ServiceNow Developer** 
 hos B3 Now blir du en viktig del av ett team av erfarna ServiceNow-specialister. Du arbetar i projekt och uppdrag med hög påverkan hos både nationella och internationella kunder inom bl.a. tillverkning, retail, finans, energi, telekom och offentlig sektor.
   

  

 Du kommer att utveckla, konfigurera och förbättra lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen. Rollen är teknisk och hands-on, med stort fokus på programmering, modern utveckling och kvalitetssäkring.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Utveckla lösningar i ServiceNow med moderna kodningsmetoder och enligt best practice.
* Arbeta med Flow Designer, IntegrationHub, Scripted REST APIs och andra automatiserings- och integrationskomponenter.
* Utveckla användargränssnitt, formulär och logik genom både low-code och custom code.
* Översätta funktionella krav till tekniska lösningar.
* Samarbeta nära kundens verksamhet för att skapa värdeskapande lösningar.
* Bidra med teknisk rådgivning i utvecklings- och arkitekturfrågor.


 Vi söker dig som är en utvecklarprofil med stark teknisk grund och intresse för både kod och affär.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har följande kvalifikationer:**
* Relevant akademisk examen eller motsvarande.
* 3–5 års erfarenhet av ServiceNow-utveckling, inklusive hands-on programmering.
* Erfarenhet av JavaScript, REST, SOAP, Scripted REST APIs samt arbete med XML/JSON.
* Erfarenhet av ServiceNow-moduler och relevanta certifieringar (ex.CAD, CIS).
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.
* En analytisk, kommunikativ och lösningsorienterad approach.
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, tänka kreativt och hantera komplexa tekniska utmaningar.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv och flexibel lönemodell.
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetstider och arbetsplats.
* Utbildningar för din professionella utveckling.
* En stark wellness-satsning genom Team B3, som främjar både hälsa och arbetsglädje.
* Kollegor med höga ambitioner och olika bakgrunder – ett inkluderande och internationellt mindset.
* En utmanande roll med stora möjligheter att växa tekniskt och professionellt.
* En kultur där vi både levererar värde till våra kunder och har roligt tillsammans.
* Möjlighet att påverka, bidra och vara med och forma framtiden för B3 Now.


**Om B3**
 På B3 Now tror vi på att kombinera yrkesstolthet med glädje. Vi drivs av att göra skillnad – både för våra kunder och våra kollegor. Vi bygger en miljö där lärande, samarbete och utveckling står i centrum, och där du får utrymme att växa i den riktning du vill.
   

  

 Vi investerar i din kompetens genom utbildningar, mentorprogram och kontinuerlig coaching. Vi tror att när du utvecklas, utvecklas även vi.
   

  

 B3 Now är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande konsultbolag. Med kontor i Sverige, Norge och Polen och internationella samarbeten hjälper vi organisationer att maximera värdet av ServiceNow genom smarta, skalbara och effektiva lösningar.
   

  

 Vi är över 1000 specialister globalt i koncernen – och växer snabbt. Hos oss får du både tryggheten av en stor aktör och närheten i ett mindre bolag där du har stort inflytande.
   

  

**Kontakt** 
 Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Ansök nu! Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Stefan Saarnak på +46 76 725 7059

title: Staff Software Engineer
description:
***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***








**Who We Are…**





 When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the
 *storytellers* 
 bringing our characters to life, the
 *creators* 
 bringing them to your living rooms and the
 *dreamers* 
 creating what’s next…
 









 From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.
 




  


 Warner Bros. has been entertaining audiences for more than 90 years through the world’s most-loved characters and franchises. Warner Bros. employs people all over the world in a wide variety of disciplines. We're always on the lookout for energetic, creative people to join our team.
 




  


**Staff**
**Software Engineer for Cluster Engineering**




  


***Every great story has a new beginning, and yours starts here.***

***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***








 When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the 
 *storytellers* 
  bringing our characters to life, the
 *creators* 
  bringing them to your living rooms and the 
 *dreamers* 
  creating what’s next…
 







 From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.
 



  


**Meet our team:** 








 The Direct to Consumer (DTC) Group is a technology company within Warner Bros Discovery. We are building a global streaming video platform (OTT), and a suite of applications to support all of our network’s brands globally. We are building modern container-based micro-services operated on AWS. Our platform covers everything from search, catalogue, video transcoding, personalization, to global subscriptions, and really much more. We build user experiences ranging from classic lean-back viewing to interactive learning applications.  We build for connected TVs, web, mobile phones, tablets, and consoles for a large footprint of WBD owned networks (HBO Max, Discovery, Food Network, Golf TV, MotorTrend, Eurosport, Discovery Play, and many more).  This is a growing, global engineering group crucial to WBD’s future. 
 







 We are hiring a Staff Software Engineer within the DTC Operational Engineering group with a focus on Cluster Engineering. The team provides a secure, efficient and easy-to-use container runtime platform. We build automation for expanding it to new markets, tenants and geographical regions, bootstrapping a fully featured container runtime ready for back-end development teams to use.
 



 We team up with other platform teams, manage the lifecycle of critical platform components and work closely with SRE to improve reliability and efficiency of the platform.
 



 We provide strategies and processes for lifecycle management of the container runtime environment. We own critical components, assess when we should introduce new ones and set the bar for quality. We focus on reducing security incidents while ensuring cost-effectiveness and supporting business needs.
 



  


**Your new role:** 








 As a Staff Software Engineer on the team, you will be a subject matter expert in Kubernetes, helping to define the overall architecture and driving implementations. You will be a strong contributor to improving our internal developer platform, serving thousands of software engineers across the globe.
 



 Tasks include operating a large fleet of Kubernetes clusters, e.g. version upgrades, security patching, cost optimization, scaling and performance tuning. As part of rolling out upgrades to hundreds of clusters, some ranging up to a thousand nodes, you will identify automation opportunities to reduce the amount of toil needed. To keep our runtime cost low, you will lead cost optimization efforts, like tweaking the Karpenter node scaling strategies, increasing the bin-packing efficiency of pods on nodes, ensuring the right node family type is used (m, c, r, spot and Graviton/ARM) and identifying over scaled infrastructure.
 



 To enable faster time to new markets and onboarding of new tenants to our streaming platform, you’ll define automation processes for the creation of new Kubernetes clusters together with bootstrapping of critical platform capabilities like service mesh, deployment systems and the observability stack (metrics, tracing, logging).
 



  


**Preferred Skills:** 







* At least 8 years of software development, infrastructure management or operations experience.
* At least 5 years of Kubernetes and AWS experience.
* Experience with architecture design and developing platform solutions.
* Ability to mentor senior engineers.
* Experience with leading large technical projects with unclear requirements.
* Ability to drive decision making and cross-team collaboration.
* Ability to write quality code for automation in python, bash or golang.
* Experience with designing infrastructure CI/CD pipelines, e.g. Jenkins or GitHub Actions.
* Experience with IaC, preferably Terraform.
* Used to Helm templating for k8s manifests.
* Understanding of how GitOps tooling like ArgoCD or Flux works.
* Experience in rolling out infrastructure changes to production by following a change management workflow.
* Knowing what metrics to monitor during a change rollout to identify problems.
* Strong ownership mentality during rollouts, stop/rollback and fix if problems occur or escalate to management/on-call if getting stuck.
* Strong sense of security, always using least privileges access and firewall configurations when needed for maintenance.
* Understanding of how running workloads on the Kubernetes clusters may be affected by cluster changes or node rotations.
* Willingness to talk to service development teams and understand their challenges when they report problems during maintenance windows.
* Ability to define and measure KPIs and honor SLAs for infrastructure maintenance.
* Experience with Git and GitHub PR workflows.
* Experience in working with Agile – Sprints, Epics/Stories, Jira.
* Experience with building internal developer platforms using technologies such as backstage/argo-workflows



**How We Get Things Done…** 




 This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at www.wbd.com/guiding-principles/  along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.
 























  


**How We Get Things Done…**









 This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at
 












 www.wbd.com/guiding-principles/
 











  
 
 along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.
 








**Championing Inclusion at WBD**



 Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
 









 If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our
 
 accessibility page
 
 for instructions to submit your request.

title: Senior Software Engineer (React Native)
description:
**Epassi’s purpose is to boost everyday well-being** 
 .
   

  

 We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions in Europe. We were established in Finland in 2007, and in 2008 we were the first company to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in Europe. Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets. Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.
   

  

**Are you interested in joining of Europe's fastest growing companies? Do you want to impact the wellbeing of millions of employees?**
 If yes, then keep reading and join us to make an impact in a fast-paced and dynamic environment where you’ll play a key role in boosting everyday wellbeing, at home, at work. Everywhere!
   

  

**Epassi’s** 
 purpose is to boost everyday well-being. We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions across Europe. We were established in Finland in 2007, and in 2008 we were the first company to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in Europe. Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets.
   

  

 Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.
   

  

 We are currently hiring
 **Senior Software Engineer (React Native)** 
 to be based in either Finland, Germany, Poland, UK, Netherlands, Sweden or UK. The preferred location is Finland or Germany.
   

  

**Your Mission At Epassi**
 You will be part of a cross-functional product team responsible for building and evolving a modern mobile application that supports Epassi’s product vision. We are adding this role to strengthen our mobile engineering capabilities and to establish a solid, scalable foundation for a React Native app that is built for long-term growth.
   

  

 In this role, you will take ownership of mobile-specific system areas, contribute to architectural decisions, and help shape how we build, operate, and continuously improve our mobile solutions across the Epassi group.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Will Be**
* Designing, building, and maintaining a high-quality React Native mobile application
* Contributing to a scalable, modular, and maintainable mobile architecture
* Ensuring high standards for code quality, testing, performance, and security
* Collaborating closely with Product, Design, Backend, QA, and DevOps
* Actively contributing to architectural discussions and technical improvements


**You’ll Be Successful In This Role If You**
* Deliver a stable and scalable mobile app with a clean, well-structured codebase
* Establish and evolve architectural patterns that support long-term development
* Take ownership and responsibility for the quality and reliability of mobile features
* Proactively identify and reduce technical debt
* Communicate clearly and work effectively within a cross-functional team
* Support reliable delivery and smooth operation following a “you build it, you run it” mindset


**What You’ll Be Doing (daily)**
* Developing mobile features using React Native and TypeScript
* Shaping and refining the mobile app architecture with scalability and modularization in mind
* Writing clean, testable, and maintainable code
* Reviewing code and providing constructive feedback to peers
* Integrating REST and/or GraphQL APIs in collaboration with Backend Engineers
* Working closely with Product Owners and Designers to refine requirements
* Monitoring app behavior, analyzing issues, and supporting incident resolution
* Supporting build, release, and deployment processes for iOS and Android
* Participating in agile ceremonies such as planning, refinements, reviews, and retrospectives
* Documenting architectural decisions and technical solution
* Leverage AI-native development tools and workflows (e.g., Copilot, Cursor, Claude) to accelerate delivery, improve code quality, and set the standard for AI-assisted engineering practices across the team.


**Your Track Record**
* Successfully delivered mobile applications or major features end to end
* Contributed to or shaped scalable mobile architectures
* Taken ownership of technical areas in long-lived software products
* Improved code quality, testing practices, or system stability in previous roles
* Worked constructively with product and design stakeholders to deliver user value
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Be part of an ambitious growth journey and join a global community of driven, bold, entrepreneurial, yet humble Epassians in a company that is constantly evolving.
* Work with a clear purpose — boosting everyday wellbeing — and create a meaningful, positive impact on both individuals and society.
* Thrive in an open and inclusive culture with low hierarchy, where relationships are built on respect, camaraderie, and shared successes and challenges.
* Come as you are — we’ll bring out the best in you and support your personal and professional growth.
* Join a fast-growing tech company with a strong financial foundation, offering opportunities to grow and make an impact together with us.
* Benefit from an inspiring and supportive work environment where employee wellbeing is a true priority.
* Contribute to solidifying our position as the number one player in Europe’s employee benefit market and help shape the next wave of success.

title: Client Engineer II - Core Experience (Formats & Foundations)
description:
We design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. Our mission is to make listening feel effortless, personal, and joyful for billions of users around the world. That means turning complexity into clarity across hundreds of touchpoints—from our mobile and desktop apps to the smart speakers, TVs, cars, and integrations where Spotify shows up every day. If it touches a consumer, we shape it. We bring deep insight into human behavior, design, and technology to craft experiences that feel intuitive, expressive, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 Format Foundations is part of Spotify’s Core Experience Studio, focused on helping users connect more deeply with creators and their content. The team owns and evolves some of Spotify’s most highly trafficked experiences, including Artist, Album, Podcast, Episode, and Audiobook surfaces.
   

  

 Alongside building user-facing experiences, the team develops mobile foundations, reusable components, and infrastructure that help teams across Spotify create consistent, high-quality experiences at scale. You’ll join a collaborative environment where engineers, designers, and product managers work closely together to shape the future of listening across music, podcasts, audiobooks, and emerging formats.
   

  

 We’re looking for a mid-level mobile engineer who enjoys building polished user experiences, contributing to platform foundations, and exploring modern engineering workflows — including experimentation and AI-assisted development practices.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Build and evolve mobile experiences used by millions of Spotify users around the world.
* Contribute to foundational mobile infrastructure and reusable platform components that support teams across Spotify.
* Collaborate closely with engineers, designers, product managers, and cross-functional partners to deliver thoughtful user experiences.
* Help shape future-facing experiences across music, podcasts, audiobooks, and emerging content formats.
* Participate in prototyping and experimentation initiatives tied to new product ideas and interaction patterns.
* Contribute to engineering quality, scalability, accessibility, and consistency across the Spotify app.
* Explore and adopt modern development workflows, including AI-assisted tooling and experimentation where appropriate.
* Improve developer experience and contribute to engineering best practices across the organization.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have experience building mobile applications using Swift and Kotlin.
* You know how to build reliable, scalable, and maintainable mobile features and components.
* You care deeply about product quality, accessibility, and user experience.
* You enjoy collaborating in cross-functional environments.
* You are experienced working closely with product managers, designers, and engineers to deliver impactful experiences.
* You are curious, adaptable, and eager to learn new technologies and ways of working.
* You have strong problem-solving skills and bring a thoughtful, growth-oriented approach to your work.
* You’re excited by experimentation and building future-facing product experiences.
* You are interested in how AI is shaping software development workflows and product innovation.
* You have experience contributing to large-scale consumer-facing applications or platforms.


 Where You’ll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm or London.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
**TL;DR**
 We're rebuilding how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science, on top of LLMs and agents. We're hiring a senior platform engineer in Stockholm to own the systems behind it: GCP infra, CI/CD, observability, data pipelines, and the AI tooling our engineers use daily. Broad role, real ownership, small team.
   

  

**The role**
 Alva runs as event-driven microservices on GCP. We ship product features on top of LLMs and agents, and our engineers use Claude Code daily.
 **The scope is broad — nobody we hire will have done all of it. We're hiring for judgment and how fast you pick up the rest.**
 What we're looking for
   

  

* You've operated production systems for several years and have opinions about how they should be built.
* You think in failure modes. You ask what happens at 3 am before you ask what happens on the happy path.
* You're effective with AI tools. You steer them, push back, and verify their output instead of trusting it.
* You explain decisions clearly and change your mind when someone has a better argument.


 If you've done most of the work below in some form, at any cloud, at any scale, we want to talk. A checklist match isn't required.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 Some shipped, some in flight, some still on the drawing board — a sample of what the team owns:
   

  

* Migrating our backend services from Kubernetes to Cloud Run, along with the Pub/Sub subscriptions.
* Introducing pgbouncer in front of Postgres to scale past our replica cap.
* Building a Backstage-style developer portal with an MCP layer — one source of truth for services, conventions, and architecture, for engineers and coding agents alike.
* Scaffolding agentic features so product squads ship them without reinventing prompts, evals, and guardrails each time.
* A protobuf schema registry and data contracts pipeline to fix the drift between services and BigQuery.
* Enabling the data team — shared patterns and pipelines (dlt, BigQuery) that let analytics work scale alongside engineering.


**How We Work**
 We use Claude Code heavily. We ship product features on top of LLMs (Gemini API), agents, and tooling like Langfuse for evaluation. We want engineers who treat AI as a collaborator they steer, not a tool they trust blindly.
   

  

 The platform team's work touches every other team. What you ship is visible across the company in days.
   

  

**Logistics**
* Location: Stockholm, hybrid.
* Team: Small platform team reporting to the platform lead.
* Stack: Python, GCP (Cloud Run, GKE, Postgres, Firestore, Pub/Sub, BigQuery), Terraform, GraphQL/Apollo, dlt, Sentry, Gemini API, Langfuse.


**Nice to have**
 None of these are required, but any one of them would let you carve out a specialty fast:
   

  

* Postgres depth: query plans, indexing strategy, connection pooling.
* Agent scaffolding and AI tooling: reusable patterns for prompts, evals, guardrails, MCP servers. Spec-driven approaches a plus.
* Distributed systems patterns: rate limiting, backpressure, queue throttling, handling bursts in a Pub/Sub-heavy system.
* Observability depth: distributed tracing, OpenTelemetry, performance profiling across services.
* Data engineering: dlt, dbt, BigQuery modeling. Not our daily focus, but useful background.


**Probably not the right fit if**
* You want a specialist role with one technology.
* You prefer long design cycles and heavy process over shipping and iterating.
* You'd rather not use AI tooling in your daily work.


**Why Alva**
 At Alva Labs, we're rebuilding how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science. We're building an AI-first hiring system that helps companies define roles, assess candidates, and make better decisions.
   

  

 We're a small, ambitious team building from Stockholm. We value ownership, velocity, and low-ego collaboration.

title: Senior Gameplay Programmer
description:
**The role**
 Avalanche Studios Group and its incubation team are seeking a Gameplay Programmer for work on a game prototype. This role involves very strong Unreal Engine knowledge and the candidate would take ownership of a broad range of gameplay features, in the context of an authoritative PvP environment.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Be a key contributor in a prototype team of 6 people, where you are one of two programmers
* Technical ownership of multiple parallel gameplay feature areas (such as movement, combat, inventory), from concept to implementation
* Work closely with designers in ensuring that technical solutions are always aligned with short- and long term design goals
* Share, with rest of team, responsibility for overall prototype stability, health and success


**Who You Are**
* 5+ years of professional C++ game development experience in Unreal Engine, including work with the Gameplay Ability System, AI behavior trees, UI, and multiplayer networking.
* Strong focus on performance and production workflows, including CPU/memory optimization, profiling and debugging, and collaborative development using Perforce.
* Experienced with Unreal networking, and have a thorough understanding of constraints and best practices when working in an authoritative PvP environment
* Comfortable with rapid prototyping and iteration cycles, including frequent team playtesting and feedbacking
* Accustomed to working with designers in interpreting and ideating from high-level briefs, in order to find the best technical path to realizing gameplay goals
* In possession of a “developer first”, player-centric mindset, with user experience prioritized equally to code architecture
* Motivated by diverse tasks and dynamic areas of responsibility, where any one week might include everything from implementing UI components to network optimization


 Note: Research shows under-represented groups in the industry might not apply to a job if they don’t check off every requirement. At Avalanche, we’re more about your drive to learn and interest in tackling challenges than what’s on your resume! So don’t stress if you don’t tick every box— shoot us your application anyway! Diverse opinions and different experiences are what make our teams so great, not itemized lists of qualifications.
   

  

**The Stockholm location**
 Our Stockholm office is situated in Södermalm, the beating heart of the city’s game industry. It’s a physical representation of our games – the lush vegetation of Just Cause and theHunter: Call of the Wild meets corroded metal straight out of Mad Max. Our hybrid model requires you to be in the office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays to foster collaboration and creativity.
   

  

**Our values**
 At Avalanche Studios Group, we create worlds beyond limits. But that’s not exclusive to our games, so we’re committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. All Avalanchers have a shared responsibility to create an open work environment where everyone is treated equally and respectfully. Being part of our world is not contingent on your heritage, your gender, or sexual orientation. It’s all about your passion and creativity.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 To apply for this position, please register below and provide your CV in English. We review applications continuously. All further studio-related information is provided under a non-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 At Avalanche Studios Group we're always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our passionate team, but please note that relocation assistance is not available for this role.

title: Experienced Embedded Firmware Developer in Stockholm
description:
**Job Title**
 Experienced Embedded Firmware Developer in Stockholm
   

  

**Job Description**
*At Axis, we’ve always been about pushing the boundaries in pursuit of innovating for a smarter, safer world. We do this by developing IP-based products and innovations for security and video surveillance. We are expanding our Stockholm team and looking for an Experienced Embedded C Developer to join us!*
**The team**
 At Axis, our teams work cross-functionally in projects to develop and deliver world class products! Your team is a new cross-functional team working on a new product. The team brings together firmware engineers with application developers building high-level functionality in collaboration with frontend developers and UX designers. The team consists of both junior and senior engineers working together in an open climate. We believe diverse perspectives are key to innovation. And one thing for sure; teamwork, collaboration and openness to each other’s ideas are essential to everyone at Axis.
   

  

 Many of our teams have Innovation days and Free Fridays where you can freely experiment your ideas. We trust our teams to decide on the best ways of working, the tools to use, and which ideas to explore – a level of freedom that truly empowers our developers.
   

  

**The role**
 You play an important role in the product development by writing well designed, efficient, scalable, readable and testable code in C. You take an early part in feature investigations and pre-studies, including collaborating on prototype code and evaluating using real world testing. Together with your team, you will be involved in setting the coding standards and ways of working for your team. In our projects we collaborate with different competence areas such as mechanics, electronics, industrial design and production technologies to name a few.
   

  

**Who are we looking for/Who are you?**
 You are curious, love challenges and to solve them in a team focused atmosphere. You get inspired by working in an environment of openness, creativity, trust, commitment, playfulness and encouragement.
   

  

 We hope you enjoy modern software development, focusing on incremental releases and user needs. You actively contribute with your ideas and thoughts. You like creating your own network of peers to discuss issues and designs. You value open communication and readily connect with colleagues to get the input you need to progress, whether in Stockholm, Lund or any other Axis site. For this position, we are primarily looking for someone with at least 5 years of working experience within product development.
   

  

**We’d love to hear that you have:**
* A master’s degree in computer science or equivalent practical experience
* Solid work experience from embedded C/C++ programming in a Linux environment
* Knowledge of other programming languages such as C, C++ or Rust
* Experience working with these technologies is a plus: Wifi, Bluetooth, GPS, battery and power saving algorithms
* Perhaps worked with either of the following tools: Git, Gerrit, Jira, Python, Docker, Docker Compose, Yocto or OpenEmbedded


**What Axis Can Do For You**
 At Axis Stockholm we are a newer R&D site with 45+ engineers so far. You will be part of creating and maintaining the collaborative atmosphere and can influence how we want to work in our part of Axis.
   

  

 Axis is a world leader in network video, where innovative technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide.
   

  

 As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.
   

  

 Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, parental leave policies, wellness benefits, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
   

  

 To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:
   

  

 Life at Axis blog
   

  

 Engineering at Axis blog
   

  

 Innovation at Axis
   

  

**Ready to Act?**
 Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications (CV and cover letter).
   

  

 We're looking for the real you, cover letters written in your own words are highly valued!
   

  

 We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!
   

  

 In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Hanna Al-Maawali at +46 46 272 1800.
   

  

 Type of Employment
   

  

 Permanent Employment
   

  

 Posting End Date
   

  

 2026-06-18
   

  

*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* 
*Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
**About Axis Communications**
 We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
   

  

 With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
   

  

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
 For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
   

  

 Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Senior Mobile App Developer (iOS/Android)
description:
Why Valtech? We’re the experience innovation company - a trusted partner to the world’s most recognized brands. To our people we offer growth opportunities, a values-driven culture, international careers and the chance to shape the future of experience.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 At Valtech, you’ll find an environment designed for continuous learning, meaningful impact, and professional growth. Whether you're pioneering new digital solutions, challenging conventional thinking or building the next generation of customer experiences, your work will help transform industries.
   

  

**We Are Proud Of**
* The work we do and the innovation we drive
* Our values of share, care and dare
* A workplace culture that fosters creativity, diversity and autonomy
* Our borderless, global framework, which enables seamless collaboration


**The role**
 Valtech is looking for a
 **Senior Mobile App Developer with 6+ years of experience** 
 , who is confident developing native mobile applications for both iOS and Android.
   

  

 This role is for someone who takes mobile development seriously—not just individual platforms, but the craft of building high‑quality mobile products as a whole. You care deeply about performance, architecture and long‑term maintainability, and you have strong opinions on how mobile apps should be built, backed by hands‑on experience across platforms. You are comfortable using AI‑powered tools responsibly to support development, improve code quality, and increase efficiency across the mobile development lifecycle.
   

  

 We are looking for a senior app developer who drives work proactively, collaborates closely with clients, product, and design teams, and confidently owns technical decisions across both iOS and Android.
   

  

 We are first and foremost looking for a senior native app developer. In addition, we highly value T‑shaped profiles who bring depth in app development combined with strength or interest in adjacent areas.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
* Development of native applications (no React Native)
* Primary focus on iOS, with solid understanding and experience in Android
* Drive app development, technical decisions, and new ideas
* Act in a proactive, advisory role towards the client
* Represent Valtech in the day-to-day collaboration
* Close collaboration within a senior, cross-functional team


**Must Have Qualifications**
 To be considered for this role, you must meet the following essential qualifications:
   

  

* iOS
+ Swift
+ SwiftUI, UIKit
+ CocoaPods, Swift Package Manager (SPM)
+ Xcode
+ MVVM
+ The Composable Architecture (TCA)


  

  

* Android
* 
+ Kotlin, Java
+ Jetpack Compose
+ Android Studio
+ Fluent in Swedish and English

**Nice To Have Qualifications** 

* Git
* Fastlane
* Firebase & Crashlytics
* REST / Networking (e.g. Alamofire)
* Database management (GRDB, Core Data)
* Authentication & security (MSAL, Auth0)
* Third-party integrations (Google ML Kit, Adyen, Contentful, Usercentrics)
* Unit testing & UI testing
* Publishing and management via App Store Connect & Google Play Console
* Beta testing (TestFlight, Apple Business Manager, Google Play Testing Tracks)
* You have a solid understanding of UX/UI design for mobile apps and can work according to each platform’s design principles when developing new features:
+ iOS: Cupertino / Liquid Glass
+ Android: Material Design


**If you do not meet all the listed qualifications or have gaps in your experience, we still encourage you to apply. At Valtech, we recognize that talent comes in many forms, and we value diverse perspectives and a willingness to learn.**
**Commitment to reaching all kinds of people**
 We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. Explore our Diversity & Inclusion site to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.
   

  

**The Benefits**
 This is a
 **full time** 
 position based in
 **Stockholm, Sweden,** 
 with
 **hybrid working model** 
 (at least 2-3 days work from our Stockholm office).
   

  

**Beyond a Competitive Compensation Package, We Offer**
* Flexibility, with remote and hybrid work options (country-dependent)
* Career advancement, with international mobility and professional development programs
* Learning and development, with access to cutting-edge tools, training and industry experts


 Our benefits are tailored to each location. Your Talent Partner will provide full details during the hiring process.
   

  

**Your application process**
 Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.
   

  

 ⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!
   

  

 We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.
   

  

**About Valtech**
 Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.
   

  

 At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.
   

  

 At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.
   

  

 Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us!

title: Finnish speaking Business Developer (Stockholm)
description:
**🚀 Why BrightAnalytics?**
 BrightAnalytics is one of the fastest growing fintech companies in Belgium. Our SaaS solution helps companies automate their management reporting. As part of our European expansion, we are looking for motivated colleagues to join our team at Stockholm. Willing to move to Sweden? You will contribute to the growth of the Finnish market working from our Stockholm office.
   

  

**💡 What does a Business Developer do?**
* You understand the requirements and needs of our prospects and introduce them to the BrightAnalytics narrative
* Together with your Finnish speaking colleagues you map out business opportunities through targeted segmentation
* You expand the number of incoming leads for our Account Executives by setting up targeted sales actions (outbound sales activities, social selling, trade shows, seminars)
* Always looking for new and creative ways of increasing our name awareness
* This position is the ideal springboard to a successful B2B sales career!


**💼 What do you bring to the sales team?**
* Holding a master’s degree, preferably in an economic area. Prior work experience is not a must
* Fluency in Finnish is essential due to the platform’s complexity, and fluency in English is a must in our international environment, fluency in Swedish is an advantage!
* Getting energized from your communication with potential customers and from the discovery and development of business opportunities
* You have the motivation and self-reliance required to fulfill this pivotal role
* Curiosity to learning new things every day
* As part of the team you are not afraid to go the extra mile
* Comfortable in a rapidly evolving environment
* Strong interest in business, finance and new technologies
* Willing to relocate to Stockholm


**✨ What are the benefits of joining this fintech scale-up?**
* You will be part of a driven, dynamic and enthusiastic team in a varied job
* Weekly internal training sessions and on-the-job coaching will teach you unique skills that will serve you well throughout your career
* We are a financially healthy scale-up with international growth ambitions
* We have an open business culture with room for personal initiative
* You will receive a competitive salary with a motivating bonus system
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Pension Plan
* Insurance (sickness, pension, TGL, TFA)
* Friday after-work drinks, legendary team-buildings, and an annual weekend with the entire BrightAnalytics team


**Ready to boost your career in fintech?**
**Apply today and grow with BrightAnalytics!**

title: Senior Lead Software Engineer, Platform (Bangkok Based, Relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

 The Opportunity
   

  

 At Agoda, Platform Engineering is central to how we scale software development across our R&D organization. The team builds and operates the shared systems, automation, and internal platforms that improve developer productivity, strengthen security, and increase the reliability and efficiency of software delivery across the company.
   

  

 As a Senior Lead Software Engineer, Platform, you will play a key role in shaping the technical direction of Agoda’s platform ecosystem. You will lead large-scale, high-impact initiatives across developer infrastructure, automation, and internal platforms, while influencing architecture, engineering standards, and long-term platform strategy across teams.
   

  

 In this Role, you’ll get to:
   

  

* Define and drive technical direction for critical platform engineering domains across Agoda
* Lead the design and evolution of large-scale platform systems supporting CI/CD, developer tooling, internal platforms, and security automation
* Deliver high-impact platform initiatives that improve engineering productivity, operational reliability, and software delivery at scale
* Drive the development of self-service internal tools and platforms that enable teams to move faster with confidence
* Act as a senior technical leader across architecture, scalability, resilience, operability, and platform strategy
* Partner with senior stakeholders across engineering, infrastructure, and security to align technical investments with organizational priorities
* Raise the bar for platform engineering through strong technical judgment, architectural guidance, and engineering best practices
* Mentor senior engineers and foster technical growth across the broader engineering organization
* Anticipate future platform needs and proactively drive investments that support Agoda’s scale and complexity


 What you’ll Need to Succeed:
   

  

* Deep experience in Software Engineering, DevOps, or Platform Engineering, including substantial experience operating at a senior technical leadership level
* Proven track record of designing and delivering large-scale, business-critical platform systems
* Strong hands-on experience across the full software development lifecycle, from architecture and implementation to deployment and operations
* Expert coding skills in a modern programming language, preferably Python or Go
* Deep expertise with developer ecosystem tooling such as Git, CI systems, Docker, and Kubernetes
* Strong architectural skills in designing highly available, fault-tolerant, scalable, and secure systems
* Strong Linux systems knowledge and production operations experience
* Proven ability to lead cross-team technical initiatives and influence direction across a broad engineering organization
* Excellent communication, mentoring, and technical leadership skills
* A passion for building platforms that enable engineering teams to work more effectively at scale


 It’s Great if you have:
   

  

* Experience with configuration management tools, preferably Ansible
* Experience building and scaling internal developer platforms, preferably with React.js and Go
* Experience with OpenStack
* Experience with container orchestration, preferably Kubernetes
* Experience with HashiCorp tools such as Consul and Vault
* Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases such as PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, and MSSQL
