 This role is a great fit for someone who enjoys working with data, product quality, and structured problem solving, and who wants plenty of room to grow into deeper analytical and modelling-oriented work over time.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Support in processing and structuring customer feedback, helping the team identify patterns, common issues, and opportunities to improve product quality and usability
* Support in creating visualizations, querying data, and analyzing quality signals to help track performance and guide product improvements
* Support in testing, validation, and QA, including helping validate behavior changes during migrations and ensuring outputs meet expected standards for accuracy and consistency
* Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders to help clarify requirements, document expected behavior, and support reliable delivery across releases
* Help maintain lightweight documentation, reports, and follow-ups that make it easier for teams to understand quality, progress, and where to focus next


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in the office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

 Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Experience in a product analyst, data analyst, QA, product operations, or similar role in a technology-driven environment
* We are looking for a curious and detail-oriented person who enjoys working with data, product behavior, and quality, and who is comfortable collaborating with technical teams. You don’t need to have done all of the below before — what matters most is strong fundamentals and a willingness to learn.
* Comfort working with data, for example by using SQL, spreadsheets, dashboards, or other tooling to explore issues and communicate insights (tooling can be learned on the job)
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with attention to detail and an interest in understanding how systems behave end-to-end
* Experience supporting testing, validation, or quality assurance activities is a plus
* Clear written and verbal communication skills: you’ll help summarize findings, document outcomes, and support structured collaboration
* Interest in developing deeper expertise over time in areas like quality analysis, structured modelling, and data-driven product improvement


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Frontend Solution Architect to Payments & Reporting - Channels | SEB, Stockholm
description:
**About the role:**
 Accounts & Payments is undergoing a major transformation, driven by regulatory, market and technological change. As an experienced Frontend Solution Architect this is your chance to make a significant impact on our customers' experience, shape the future of banking and our products, and contribute to the digital transformation of the financial industry.
   

  

 As a Frontend Solution Architect, you'll focus on designing solutions using the latest frontend technologies to create a seamless user experience while also prioritizing security, performance, and accessibility. You’ll collaborate in a cross-functional team of customer experience professionals, business analysts, architects, developers, and banking product specialists working in an agile environment. You will also be a vital contributor in our design and development process as well as part of our architecture community driving the Accounts & Payments agenda in the bank.
   

  

**As a Frontend Solution Architect, you will:**
* Be a part of setting, continuously improving and implementing the frontend architecture which drives our customer experience in line with business needs and priorities, and the overall customer experience objectives of SEB
* Working with stakeholders including Channel Owners, Project Managers and Developers to define and agree solution designs and other architectural inputs to the development of the frontend architecture
* Being an advisor and partner for Development Teams on both “why” and “how” to implement their solutions by setting design principles and standards, designing solutions in collaboration with Tech Leads and Senior Developers, contributing to Proof of Concepts, and guiding the evolution of the architecture
* Actively contributing to the development of the overall architecture within Payments and SEB through Communities of Practice, Guilds, and teamwork within the Architecture Team(s)
* Supporting the delivery of projects and epics in a Scaled Agile way of working
* You will belong to the Shared Service Architecture team within Accounts & Payments reporting to the Team Manager for that team, you will be an active contributor to the Enterprise and Domain Architecture group and be part of the Architecture Community within Accounts & Payments and SEB
* Your focus will be to architect the frontend customer experience architecture, but you will need to work closely with, and actively contribute to, the associated payment platform and reporting areas


**To thrive in this role, we believe:**
* You have a strong and demonstrable foundation in frontend development (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript), a deep knowledge and passion for cutting-edge web technologies and frameworks (Angular, React, TypeScript, Next.js) , and the ability to lead technical decisions
* You have 5+ years’ experience as a Frontend Solution Architect or possibly a Tech Lead, who enjoys building high-quality, customer-focused applications
* You are knowledgeable of UX principles, WCAG, and accessibility best practices
* You have experience with cloud platforms (Google Cloud, AWS, Azure, OpenShift) and DevOps
* You have a collaborative mindset, strong communication skills, and a drive to explore new technologies
* You are comfortable working with non-technical colleagues such as Project Managers or Channel Owners and can present solution designs or decisions without all the technical details
* You are very experienced in managing diverse stakeholders in large organizations and navigating ambiguity, you have experience in both traditional waterfall Project Management and Scaled Agile environments
* You are “hands-on” when needed with the possibility to code PoCs to prove out ideas or guide development teams
* You combine a pragmatic approach with a creative and innovative mindset to find best solutions to business challenges
* BSc in computer science or related field
* You are fluent in English


**Would be considered as advantage, if you have:**
* Experience leading or contributing to complex software solutions in agile teams
* Experience in financial services and bring deep business knowledge ideally in Payments and / or related domains such as Cash Management
* Familiarity with REST APIs, API Gateways, automated testing, and CI/CD pipelines.
* Knowledge of backend tech (.NET, Spring Boot, Jenkins) is a plus
* Any certifications or architecture methodologies experience


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 Welcome with your application! Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than 29th of May, 2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact Joseph O'Connor at joseph.oconnor@seb.se.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB here: www.sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity are crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe, or where they come from.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: Design Engineer - Private Markets Platform
description:
**About ROYC**
 ROYC is the operating system for private markets, founded by leaders from Blackstone, Nordea, and Klarna. We provide one platform for every private markets workflow, helping fund managers, private banks, wealth managers and multi-family offices deploy private market strategies at scale. By combining technology, structuring and operational services, ROYC replaces fragmented tools and manual processes with structured workflows across the full lifecycle: from investor readiness and KYC to subscriptions, capital calls, reporting, and long-term servicing. Our goal is to become the leading AI-driven private markets infrastructure platform for launching, marketing and operating funds across Europe, the Middle East and Asia.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
* 5+ years of experience, shipping products users genuinely love
* Portfolio demonstrating sophisticated interactions and thoughtful user affordances required
* Ability to make smart trade-offs between speed and polish, knowing when to ship and when to refine
* Expertise in React/TypeScript and the broader frontend ecosystem
* Experience translating scrappy explorations into production-ready experiences
* Proficiency in Figma for design exploration and collaboration
* Strong product sense with an eye for detail, accessibility, and usability


**What You'll Do**
 In summary: Serve as the connective layer between design and engineering on ROYC's investor platform — taking complex private markets workflows (KYC, subscriptions, capital calls, portfolio views, reporting) from Figma to production in React/TypeScript, owning the interaction patterns and design system that make these flows fast, clear, and reliable for fund managers and investors.
   

  

* Design and build world-class product experiences across onboarding, KYC flows, subscription journeys, portfolio views, and reporting
* Drive front-end execution — pioneering new interaction patterns, micro-animations, and delightful details that elevate the entire experience
* Implement features in React/TypeScript with obsessive attention to detail
* Collaborate with backend, design, and product teams to bring complex financial workflows to life in a seamless way
* Explore and iterate on visual designs with designers, translating explorations into scalable, web-native implementations
* Build, maintain, and evolve our React/Tailwind design system to enhance consistency while enabling creativity across the platform
* You'll be our first dedicated Design Engineer, working closely with our lead designer, product manager and reporting to the CTO. This is a role where you spend about 50% of your time in the codebase and 50% in Figma.
* Have real impact and ownership from day one — your work ships directly to fund managers and investors, and you'll have a meaningful voice in shaping the product, the design system, and how we work


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React, TypeScript, Tailwind, Vite
* Backend: Node.js, NestJS
* AI in our workflow: We use AI tools daily across design, coding, and product work to move faster and ship better
* Collaboration: The whole team runs on Notion for docs, specs, sprints, and decisions


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form
* Connect with the team, learn more about how we work and if we are a good fit
* Show us how you approach problems during hands-on interview


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation structure including bonus scheme
* Health benefits including fitness allowance
* Office in central Stockholm with breakfast on office days
* Fitness allowance


**Why ROYC?**
 We offer a flexible, fast-moving start-up atmosphere paired with the resources of a mature scale-up. You'll work closely with a diverse, international team of people pushing the boundaries of the wealth-tech space. We value quick decisions and modern tools, and we actively support work-life balance with lovely breakfasts, fun team activities, and the maximum legal wellness allowance.
   

  

**About Your Application**
 This is a full-time, permanent position. We review applications on a rolling basis — the right candidate can start immediately.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Central Stockholm (Hybrid, 3 days/week in office)
   

  

 Please submit your application (including a link to your portfolio) in English — it's our company language so you'll be speaking lots of it if you join.

title: Founding GTM Lead
description:
In a world where products and software can be replicated overnight, intellectual property is the last durable moat. Every breakthrough in AI, biotech, clean energy, and autonomous systems depends on patent protection to survive. Yet the system meant to protect these innovations hasn't kept up.
   

  

 Stilta exists to fix that: we build agentic AI for intellectual property, creating the technology that will finally modernize how the world’s most important ideas are defended.
   

  

 We just closed one of the largest seed rounds in Y Combinator, backed by top Silicon Valley investors. We already work with several of the world’s largest IP firms and Global Fortune 500 companies, and are growing rapidly.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Every deal to date has been closed by the founders - from Global Fortune 500 enterprises to some of the largest IP firms in the world. The product is proven and the pipeline is growing. What's missing is a real sales function.
   

  

 You will be our first GTM hire and the person who builds the sales motion from zero. This is not a role for someone who wants to step into structure - you are the structure. You will run AI-powered outbound at scale, iterate the playbook in real time alongside the founders, and turn a working pipeline into a repeatable engine.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Run AI-native outbound - leverage Claude, AI research tools, and modern sales stack to generate qualified pipeline at a scale that wouldn't be possible without it
* Own the full sales cycle from prospecting to close for IP law firms and enterprise IP teams
* Iterate on and improve the sales playbook alongside the founders
* Run demos for senior patent attorneys and heads of IP
* Cultivate relationships with key prospects (incl. travel to clients)
* Build the sales infrastructure - CRM, pipeline tracking, forecasting - so this function scales well beyond you


**What we are looking for**
* AI-native operator - you don't just use AI tools, you build with them. Outbound, research, prep, qualification - your workflow is automated where it can be and high-touch where it matters. We're an AI company and our GTM has to reflect that or we lose
* Enterprise SaaS sales experience with a track record you can walk us through with real numbers - experience selling to enterprise or professional services is a plus
* You can earn the trust of sophisticated, sceptical buyers - senior patent attorneys who've heard every pitch and need substance, not slides
* Builder mentality - you design systems and processes, not just close deals
* Early-stage startup experience is a plus. What's required is hunger, resourcefulness, and the drive to build from zero


 What we can offer
   

  

* Competitive Salary + Equity
* Unlimited Claude Code - experiment with AI‑assisted workflows, prototypes, and automations from day one
* Sponsored VISA
* A front row seat - you will be shaping the foundation of our business


 |
   

  

*Stilta are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, or background. Selection for this role will be based solely on suitability for the position and does not discriminate on any protected characteristic.*

title: Live Marketing Specialist FTC | Candy Crush Soda Saga
description:
**Craft:**
 Marketing
   

  

**Job Description:**
****Craft your next adventure at King****
 We’re looking for a Live Marketing Specialist to help bring our in-game experiences to life for millions of players around the world. You’ll turn ideas into impactful player moments — designing, building, and optimizing live marketing campaigns that engage, surprise, and delight.
   

  

****Role Purpose****
 As a Live Marketing Specialist, you’ll play a key role in delivering engaging, data-driven campaigns that enhance player retention and drive long-term value. You’ll combine technical expertise with analytical thinking to execute, monitor, and optimize campaigns across multiple channels. Working closely with the Product and Live Marketing Director and cross-functional teams, you’ll ensure that every message is timely, relevant, and aligned with player needs and product goals.
   

  

***This is an FTC opportunity for a 6 months contract, August 2026 - Jan 2027***
****Your Role within the Kingdom****
* Build, QA, and deploy multi-channel Live Marketing campaigns across platforms such as Braze, App Store Connect, social, and in-game messaging systems, ensuring alignment with product events and business priorities.
* Define, build and optimize player segments based on behaviour, lifecycle stage, and targeting criteria.
* Identify and drive new Live Marketing opportunities by analysing player behaviour, campaign performance, and content gaps — testing innovative approaches to increase engagement and retention.
* Partner closely with the Product and Marketing teams to refine campaign strategy, including timing, frequency, and messaging.
* Conduct A/B testing to optimize content performance and channel effectiveness.
* Monitor campaign results, identifying trends, anomalies and actionable insights.
* Ensure campaigns are localized and fully aligned with the product calendar.
* Maintain a high standard of delivery quality, precision, and attention to detail across all Live Marketing initiatives.


**Skills & Experience**
* Proven experience in campaign setup and segmentation using tools such as Braze, Leanplum, OneSignal, or similar platforms.
* Understanding of lifecycle marketing flows, campaign logic, and scheduling mechanics.
* Strong attention to detail and a rigorous QA mindset.
* Analytical skills with the ability to interpret performance metrics and make data-informed recommendations.
* Comfortable working with large datasets and complex tagging systems.
* Basic design/UX awareness to ensure engaging and user-friendly messaging.


**About You**
 You’re a technically strong, detail oriented marketer that thrives in a fast-paced environment, with a deep curiosity about player behaviour and lifecycle optimization. You balance creative execution with analytical precision and are passionate about elevating Live Marketing craft standards across campaigns.
   

  

**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Head of Modern Workplace Support (DWS) Services
description:
**Location: Stockholm, Sweden**
 CGI is looking for a highly capable and hands-on Director of Digital Workplace Services to lead and modernize our workplace technology landscape.
   

  

 This is not a traditional operational management role. We are looking for a technically strong Digital Workplace leader who understands modern workplace architecture, end-user experience, automation, collaboration platforms, workplace transformation, and next-generation support services.
   

  

 You will lead the evolution of our Digital Workplace function while remaining deeply connected to technology, delivery, operational excellence, and innovation.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 As Director of Digital Workplace Services, you will own the strategy, transformation, and operational delivery of our workplace ecosystem across multiple functions including:
   

  

* Digital Workplace & End User Computing
* Service Desk & Support Operations
* Workplace Experience & Productivity Services
* IT Service Management (ITSM)
* Modern Collaboration Platforms
* Endpoint Management & Automation


 You will work closely with senior stakeholders, architects, operations teams, and business leadership to build a future-ready digital workplace environment that improves employee productivity, security, automation, and user experience.
   

  

**Key responsibilities include:**
* Driving the Digital Workplace strategy and roadmap aligned with business goals
* Leading workplace transformation initiatives including AI-enabled support, automation, self-service, and modern support models
* Improving end-user experience across collaboration, mobility, endpoint, and productivity platforms
* Leading and mentoring managers and technical teams across Workplace Services, Service Desk, and ITSM
* Modernizing operational processes using ITIL, automation, analytics, and proactive support methodologies
* Managing vendors, budgets, forecasting, and service performance
* Acting as a trusted advisor to senior leadership on workplace technology trends and transformation opportunities
* Ensuring scalable, secure, and efficient workplace operations across the organization


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
 We are specifically searching for a leader with deep practical experience in Digital Workplace Services — someone who has built, transformed, or operated modern workplace environments hands-on.
   

  

**You likely bring experience in several of the following areas:**
* Modern Workplace / Digital Workplace transformation
* Microsoft 365 ecosystem (Teams, Intune, Endpoint Manager, Entra ID, Copilot)
* End User Computing (EUC)
* Device lifecycle & endpoint management
* Automation & self-service support
* AI-enabled workplace services
* ServiceNow or modern ITSM platforms
* Workplace analytics and employee experience platforms
* Hybrid workplace technologies
* Service Desk modernization
* Security and compliance within workplace environments


**Your Profile:**
* Strong leadership experience managing both people and delivery
* Technically credible and comfortable engaging with engineers and architects
* Able to balance strategy with operational execution
* Passionate about modern workplace trends and emerging technologies
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Experience driving organizational and technology transformation
* Commercially aware with experience managing budgets and service performance
* Strong written and verbal English and Swedish (preferable) skills.


**Why CGI?**
 At CGI, you become part of one of the world's largest IT and business consulting organizations. We combine global scale with local entrepreneurship and innovation.
   

  

 You will have the opportunity to shape the future workplace experience for both employees and customers while working with highly skilled teams in a collaborative and people-focused culture.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the position, please contact: trideep.mukherjee@cgi.com We are working on an ongoing selection process, so please submit your application as soon as possible, but no later than June 1st.
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Junior Embedded Developer in Stockholm
description:
**Job Title**
 Junior Embedded Developer in Stockholm
   

  

**Job Description**
*At Axis, we’ve always been about pushing the boundaries in pursuit of innovating for a smarter, safer world. We do this by developing IP-based products and innovations for security and video surveillance. As a junior developer, you'll contribute directly to these cutting-edge solutions, learning and growing as you help shape the future of security. We are expanding our Stockholm team and are looking for two embedded C/Go Developers to join us.*
**The team**
 At Axis, our teams work cross-functionally in projects to develop and deliver world class products! The teams are small, empowered agile teams who support each other, cooperate to reach their goals together and foster an environment of collaboration and openness to new ideas. We believe diverse perspectives are key to innovation. And one thing for sure; teamwork, collaboration and openness to each other’s ideas are essential to everyone at Axis. You'll be supported by experienced colleagues, with opportunities for mentorship and continuous learning built into our collaborative environment.
   

  

 Many of our teams have Innovation days and Free Fridays where you can freely experiment your ideas. We trust our teams to decide on the best ways of working, the tools to use, and which ideas to explore – a level of freedom that truly empowers our developers.
   

  

**The role**
 We are currently recruiting for two junior positions to the same team. One with more focus on firmware development in embedded C and one with more focus on software development in Go/Golang in the back-end and TypeScript/React in the Front-End.
   

  

 The team is a new cross-functional team working on a new product. They bring together firmware engineers with application developers building high-level functionality in collaboration with frontend developers and UX designers. This is a unique opportunity to grow your skills in a new product team, where you'll be actively involved in shaping its development from the ground up. You will receive guidance and support as you develop well-designed, efficient, scalable, readable, and testable code in Go or embedded C. You will take an early part in feature investigations and pre-studies, including collaborating on prototype code and evaluating using real world testing. Together with your team, you will be involved in setting the coding standards and ways of working for your team.
   

  

**Who are we looking for/Who are you?**
 You are in the beginning of your software development career, either a new graduate or have a couple of years of working experience, with a genuine interest to learn and develop your programming skills. You are curious, love challenges and to solve them in a team focused atmosphere. You get inspired by working in an environment of openness, creativity, trust, commitment, playfulness and encouragement.
   

  

 We hope you enjoy modern software development, focusing on incremental releases, user needs and data monitoring. You actively contribute with your ideas and thoughts. You like creating your own network of peers to discuss issues and designs. You value open communication and readily connect with colleagues to get the input you need to progress, whether in Stockholm, Lund or any other Axis site.
   

  

**We’d love to hear that you have:**
* A Master's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field completing latest in summer 2026, or equivalent practical experience (e.g., strong personal projects, boot camp completion, or relevant work experience).
* Desire to learn Go/Golang programming in an embedded Linux environment
* Desire to learn embedded C firmware development in an embedded Linux environment
* Some familiarity of programming languages such as Go, C++, C or Rust is a plus


**What Axis Can Do For You**
 At Axis Stockholm we are a newer R&D site with 45+ engineers so far. You will be part of creating and maintaining the collaborative atmosphere and can influence how we want to work in our part of Axis.
   

  

 Axis is a world leader in network video, where innovative technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide.
   

  

 As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.
   

  

 Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, parental leave policies, wellness benefits, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
   

  

 To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:
   

  

 Life at Axis blog
   

  

 Engineering at Axis blog
   

  

 Innovation at Axis
   

  

**Ready to Act?**
 Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications (CV and cover letter).
   

  

 We're looking for the real you, cover letters written in your own words are highly valued! If you are interested in a specific position of the two mentioned, make sure to add that to your application.
   

  

 We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!
   

  

 In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Hanna Al-Maawali at +46 46 272 1800.
   

  

 Type of Employment
   

  

**Trial Of Qualifications (Fixed Term)**
 Posting End Date
   

  

 2026-06-05
   

  

*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* 
*Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
**About Axis Communications**
 We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
   

  

 With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
   

  

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
 For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
   

  

 Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Senior Client Engineer - Core Experience (Formats & Foundations)
description:
We design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. Our mission is to make listening feel effortless, personal, and joyful for billions of users around the world. That means turning complexity into clarity across hundreds of touchpoints—from our mobile and desktop apps to the smart speakers, TVs, cars, and integrations where Spotify shows up every day. If it touches a consumer, we shape it. We bring deep insight into human behavior, design, and technology to craft experiences that feel intuitive, expressive, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 Formats & Foundations is part of Spotify’s Core Experience Studio, focused on helping users connect more deeply with creators and their content. The team owns and evolves some of Spotify’s most highly trafficked experiences, including Artist, Album, Podcast, Episode, and Audiobook surfaces.
   

  

 Beyond building user-facing experiences, the team develops foundational mobile capabilities, reusable components, and platform infrastructure that enable teams across Spotify to deliver high-quality, consistent experiences at scale. We work at the intersection of product experience and platform engineering, balancing innovation, performance, and usability across the Spotify app.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Senior Client Engineer who is passionate about mobile craftsmanship, scalable architecture, and building tools and foundations that empower product teams. You’ll help shape technical direction, mentor engineers, and contribute to experiences used by millions of listeners every day.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Design, build, and evolve mobile experiences across some of Spotify’s most visible consumer surfaces.
* Contribute to the architecture and development of reusable mobile foundations, frameworks, and platform capabilities.
* Lead technical initiatives that improve scalability, performance, reliability, and developer experience across the Spotify app.
* Collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, designers, and platform teams to shape product direction and technical strategy.
* Drive engineering quality through thoughtful code reviews, testing practices, observability, and operational excellence.
* Mentor engineers and contribute to a collaborative, inclusive, and growth-oriented engineering culture.
* Help teams across Spotify move faster by improving tooling, workflows, documentation, and shared engineering standards.
* Participate in experimentation and prototyping efforts tied to future-facing content and listening experiences.
* Explore modern engineering workflows, including AI-assisted development tools and emerging mobile technologies.
* Balance short-term product needs with long-term platform sustainability and technical health.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have strong experience building mobile applications using Swift and Kotlin.
* You have experience contributing to large-scale consumer-facing applications with high performance and reliability expectations.
* You know how to design scalable, maintainable mobile systems and reusable platform components.
* You care deeply about user experience, accessibility, performance, and engineering craftsmanship.
* You are experienced collaborating across disciplines and influencing technical decisions in cross-functional environments.
* You communicate technical ideas clearly and thoughtfully with both technical and non-technical audiences.
* You enjoy mentoring and supporting engineers through collaboration, feedback, and knowledge sharing.
* You are comfortable navigating ambiguity and making thoughtful technical trade-offs.
* You are curious about emerging technologies and evolving development practices, including AI-assisted engineering workflows.
* You bring a growth mindset and continuously look for opportunities to improve systems, products, and team practices.


 Where You’ll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm or London.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Engineering Manager, Observability Dept | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

 This is a remote position. We are looking for candidates in the NASA (EST-only) or EMEA time zones.
   

  

**What is Grafana Cloud?**
 Grafana Cloud is our composable observability platform that integrates metrics, logs, traces, and profiles with Grafana. It allows our customers to leverage the best open source observability software – including Prometheus, Mimir, Loki, Tempo, and Pyroscope – without the overhead of installing, maintaining and scaling their own observability stack.
   

  

 The Observability department is focused on enabling developers to understand the health and performance of their applications and infrastructure in any environment by providing tools to instrument their code, ingest observability data into Grafana Cloud and visualize and explore it.
   

  

**What is Grafana Alloy?**
 Alloy is a distribution of the OpenTelemetry collector. Its purpose is to collect, process, and export telemetry signals at scale. Alloy combines the strength of leading ecosystems like OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Loki, Pyroscope, and more. Alloy is an open source project that is maintained on Github.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Manage and develop the team of Alloy engineers, providing regular feedback and supporting each person’s growth through career conversations. This is a remote team, distributed between EMEA and NASA.
* Support the Alloy team on their path to closer collaboration with the OpenTelemetry collector community. Address roadblocks.
* Collaborate closely with go-to-market to ensure customers and prospects are successful with their Alloy journey.
* Work closely with product and engineering leadership to ensure Alloy fits seamlessly into the end-to-end user experience for Grafana cloud products.
* Provide guidance throughout the project lifecycle from early ideation through planning, execution and post‑launch guiding the team to deliver high‑quality results consistently.
* Foster a psychologically safe environment where engineers can learn, experiment and iterate quickly, encouraging innovation and a culture of continuous improvement.
* Work across team boundaries by contributing to projects outside your team’s scope and partnering with other functions to solve customer problems.


 As a company we are remote-first and global, we embrace people of different experiences and backgrounds to build diverse teams where every person brings a new perspective to the software.
   

  

 We invest heavily in developer productivity. You can use modern AI coding assistants as part of your daily workflow (your choice of tools, within security guidelines), backed by a company-funded usage budget so you can iterate quickly without unnecessary friction. We encourage pragmatic AI-assisted development: faster prototyping, test generation, refactors, documentation, and incident follow-ups—always paired with strong code review and quality standards. You’ll also have access to frontier models (e.g., GPT-Codex 5.4, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3 Pro).
   

  

**What are we looking for in you?**
* You should have enough domain knowledge in observability and OpenTelemetry to manage a team that will collaborate closely with the OpenTelemetry collector community.
* You will be comfortable working with engineering teams who have a strong sense of autonomy in their decision-making, be it technical or product focused.
* While you’re great with people and adept at managing relationships, you still keep up-to-date with the latest technical trends and shifts in order to maintain and enhance your understanding of the challenges your teams face.
* Comfortable collaborating across time zones and cultures in a fully remote environment, using clear, empathetic communication to build trust, connection, and psychological safety.
* Demonstrated ability to manage complexity, align stakeholders, and elevate team performance to deliver meaningful, high-quality results.
* Deeply customer-focused, consistently grounding decisions and technical choices in user needs and real-world impact.
* Solid understanding of distributed systems principles, including scalability, fault tolerance, consistency, and observability.


 Comfort with AI-assisted tooling. We embrace AI and agentic development so we expect you to be curious and comfortable using AI-powered tools and ideally have practical experience folding them into a team’s workflow.
   

  

 In Sweden the Base compensation range for this role is SEK 878,578 - SEK 1,054,000 Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed in the interview process. Benefits include equity, bonus (if applicable) and other benefits listed here.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Senior Fullstack Engineer - Commerce Platform
description:
The Subscriptions Mission builds and evolves the experiences and systems that allow millions of listeners to discover, subscribe to, and enjoy Spotify Premium. Our teams focus on awareness, acquisition, activation, retention, and commerce — ensuring seamless experiences that help fans connect more deeply with the audio they love while enabling sustainable growth for Spotify.
   

  

 The Commerce Platform powers the purchasing and subscription systems that enable millions of users worldwide to access Spotify Premium. Within this area, the Payment SDK squad is responsible for the technology that handles initial payment transactions across our platform.
   

  

 As a Senior Fullstack Engineer, you’ll work on systems that process large volumes of transactions and support the global purchase experience. Your work will help evolve the platform that powers Spotify’s commerce ecosystem, ensuring our payment infrastructure remains scalable, reliable, and innovative as we grow.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Architect and implement scalable backend services and frontend components that power Spotify’s commerce platform.
* Design and develop critical capabilities in Java and Python services operating in a high-volume, low-latency environment.
* Build and maintain the pay-in functionality that enables payment processing across Spotify products.
* Run and analyze experiments to improve payment performance and user experience.
* Improve system reliability through monitoring, alerting, and operational best practices.
* Collaborate with engineers, product managers, and cross-functional teams to deliver impactful commerce features.
* Contribute to evolving Spotify’s payment infrastructure and SDK capabilities for developers across the company.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You are experienced with modern JavaScript development, testing, and debugging.
* You have experience building and scaling backend services using Java and/or Python.
* You have worked in cloud-native environments such as Google Cloud Platform or similar platforms.
* You have experience designing and maintaining libraries, frameworks, or developer tools used by other engineers.
* You have hands-on experience working with scalable databases such as PostgreSQL.
* You approach engineering problems with strong analytical thinking and practical solutions.
* You communicate clearly and collaborate well with cross-functional teams.
* Experience working in e-commerce, financial systems, or high-volume transaction environments is a plus.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: IT-specialist (kravanalytiker)
description:
Svenska kraftnät är en nyckelaktör i energiomställningen. Vår IT-division växer för att möjliggöra en fördubblad elproduktion och en fossilfri framtid. Med den senaste tekniken ökar vi både infrastrukturens kapacitet och utvecklingstakten inom digitalisering och processer.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 I rollen som kravanalytiker kommer du att arbeta med system som hanterar och bearbetar stora datamängder och används för planering av det svenska transmissionsnätet. De system som teamet utvecklar är nya och där finns möjlighet att påverka arkitektur, design och teknikval. Rollen fungerar som en brygga mellan verksamhet, IT och utvecklingsteamet.
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i ett agilt och tvärfunktionellt team som idag består av kravanalytiker, scrum master, systemutvecklare och testare. En blandning av anställda och konsulter.
   

  

 Ditt arbete kommer primärt omfatta att:
   

  

* Fånga och dokumentera funktionella och icke-funktionella krav genom workshops, användarintervjuer, observationer och dokumentstudier.
* Dela upp krav i hanterbara värdeskapande leveranser och definiera acceptanskriterier.
* Säkerställa att kraven är skrivna på ett utvecklingsbart och testbart sätt
* Arbeta tätt tillsammans med olika intressenter som användare, produktägare, verksamhetsexperter, arkitekter och utvecklingsteam för att säkerställa att funktionella och icke-funktionella krav är tydliga, prioriterade och förstådda.
* Säkerställa att kraven kommuniceras och förankras med och mellan olika kravställare och intressenter
* Ansvara för spårbarhet av krav genom hela utvecklingskedjan.
* Medverka i kontinuerlig förbättring av teamets arbetssätt, dokumentation och kravprocesser.
* Stödja test och kvalitetssäkring genom bl.a. kravvalidering och granskning av testfall.
* Ge metodstöd inom kravhantering till verksamhetsspecialister/kravställare avseende både funktionella och icke-funktionella krav
* Utforma eller revidera arbetsprocesser för mottagandeorganisationen


 Utvecklingsmöjligheter
   

  

 På Svenska kraftnät satsar vi på din kompetensutveckling. Tillsammans med din enhetschef planerar du kontinuerligt hur du kan växa i din roll – både med interna och externa resurser.
   

  

 Du får tillgång till LinkedIn Learning, med ett brett utbud av kurser inom teknik, ledarskap, kommunikation och personlig utveckling. Det gör det enkelt att stärka din kompetens när det passar dig och bidra till både din egen och organisationens framgång.
   

  

 Som IT-specialist har du dessutom möjlighet att utvecklas inom uppdragen, från Kravanalytiker till Produktägare och även tillsammans med verksamheten, ta dig an nya roller och arbeta i olika team, projekt och initiativ. Hos oss är din utveckling en del av vår långsiktiga strategi.
   

  

 Bidra/utmaningar
   

  

 Division IT ansvarar för support, drift, vidmakthållande och vidareutveckling av affärsverkets IT-stöd. Tjänsten tillhör avdelningen IK (IT för Kraftsystem & elmarknad), i Sektion IKA (IT för Kraftsystemanalys), med placering i en enhet som arbetar med applikationer för analys. Enheten omfattar cirka 20 medarbetare. Enheten har utvecklingsteam som arbetar agilt i projekt och förvaltning och arbetsgrupp som ansvarar för arkitektur inom det digitala uppdraget.
   

  

**Om dig**
**Skallkrav:**
 Svenska Kraftnät har hårda krav på säkerhet och dokumentation och vi söker dig som kan ta dig an arbetet på ett strukturerat sätt för att säkerställa att arbetet följer riktlinjerna. Du ska ha hög analytisk förmåga och kunna identifiera krav för komplexa system. Med många intressenter krävs dessutom att du är kommunikativ och har en stor vilja att samarbeta.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och din förmåga att samarbeta, kommunicera och driva arbetet framåt.
   

  

 Vidare har du en högskole-/universitetsutbildning om minst 180 hp inom systemvetenskap/IT, alternativt en masterexamen med inriktning mot energibranschen eller motsvarande kompetens förvärvad på annat sätt som Svenska kraftnät bedömer som likvärdig.
   

  

 Du har även:
   

  

* minst 6-års erfarenhet av arbetet som kravanalytiker i en agil kontext, inklusive kravdokumentation, kravvalidering, arbete med user storys, acceptanskriterier, UX och spårbarhet
* minst 6-års erfarenhet av effektkartläggning och prioriteringar samt att facilitera och leda workshops
* erfarenhet av kravverktyg som Azure DevOps, Jira eller GitLab, och UX/designverktyg som Figma, Axure, och Adobe XD
* förmåga att agera agil produktägare i SCRUM team
* minst 4-års erfarenhet av arbete i energibranchen
* goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift


 Vi ser det som
 **meriterande** 
 om du har:
   

  

* utbildning/kurs inom Elkraft
* flera års erfarenhet av kravarbete inom offentlig sektor som är samhällsviktig och arbetar med samhällskritisk infrastruktur
* flera års erfarenhet av kravställning i komplexa eller säkerhetsskyddskänsliga IT-miljöer
* erfarenhet av kravställning kopplat till datalager, dataplattformar eller datakvalitet
* erfarenhet av kravställning kopplat till tillgänglighetskrav enligt WCAG
* certifieringar inom kravhantering IREB eller motsvarande och inom Scrum


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad i Sundbyberg
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Resor kan förekomma i begränsad omfattning i denna tjänst.
* Sista ansökningsdag är den 4 juni, vi använder urvalsfrågor istället för personligt brev.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidare anställning
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


 Vid frågor om tjänsten kontakta gärna David Ranner, rekryterande chef 010 489 29 15, vid frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta Anna Maria Hedman, ansvarig rekryterare, 010 489 26 71. Fackliga representanter är Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72 och Erica Midfjäll ST, 010 475 87 31. Du når oss också via e-post: fornamn.efternamn@svk.se
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Staff Software Engineer, Platform (Bangkok Based, Relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

 The Opportunity
   

  

 At Agoda, our Platform Engineering team builds and operates the foundations that power software development across our R&D organization. From CI/CD and developer tooling to internal platforms and security automation, the team plays a critical role in enabling engineers to build, test, and ship software quickly, reliably, and securely.
   

  

 As a Staff Software Engineer, Platform, you will help design, build, and scale the core systems and internal tools that improve developer productivity and engineering effectiveness across Agoda. This is a hands-on role for an experienced engineer who enjoys solving complex technical problems at scale and driving improvements across the software development lifecycle.
   

  

 In this Role, you’ll get to:
   

  

* Design, build, and enhance platform capabilities that support Agoda’s engineering organization at scale
* Improve CI/CD systems, developer workflows, and security automation across the software development lifecycle
* Maintain and evolve central developer systems such as source control, CI, service discovery, and related internal platforms
* Build internal tools and full-stack web portals that improve usability, efficiency, and self-service for engineers
* Work across development and infrastructure domains to simplify operations through automation and platform engineering
* Contribute to architectural decisions that improve platform scalability, resilience, availability, and security
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex issues across platform and infrastructure systems
* Promote engineering best practices in automation, testing, observability, and operational excellence


 What you’ll Need to Succeed:
   

  

* Extensive experience in Software Engineering, DevOps, or Platform Engineering
* Strong hands-on experience across the full software development lifecycle, from design through production operations
* Strong coding skills in a modern programming language, preferably Golang
* Experience with developer tooling and ecosystem technologies such as Git, CI systems, Docker, and Kubernetes
* Solid understanding of software architecture principles, including scalability, high availability, and fault tolerance
* Strong Linux systems knowledge and troubleshooting skills
* Ability to work across technical boundaries and solve end-to-end engineering problems
* Strong communication and collaboration skills
* A passion for learning new technologies and automating large-scale engineering processes


 It’s Great if you have:
   

  

* Experience with configuration management tools, preferably Ansible
* Experience building full-stack internal applications, preferably with React.js and Go
* Experience with OpenStack
* Experience with container orchestration, preferably Kubernetes
* Experience with HashiCorp tools such as Consul and Vault
* Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases such as PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, and MSSQL

 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.

title: Projektkoordinator IT
description:
Vi söker en strukturerad och kommunikativ projektkoordinator med öga för detaljer och en stark förmåga att hantera flera bollar i luften. Du kommer att fungera som navet mellan leverantör och kund i implementationen av ett nytt IT-system, där hög kvalité och tydlig kommunikation ligger i fokus. I rollen samarbetar du nära en IT-servicedesk-funktion, både under projektets gång och i överlämningsfasen. Efter projektets avslut blir du en del av denna gruppering och fortsätter bidra till förvaltning och vidare supportering av systemet.
  
  

**Arbetsuppgifter:**  

Planera, koordinera och följa upp leveranser mellan leverantör och kund
  
  

Säkerställa att överenskomna tidsplaner hålls samt hantera eventuella avvikelser
  
  

Driva och koordinera förändringsarbeten i dialog med olika parter
  
  

Bidra till struktur och tydlighet i planering och uppföljning
  
  

Dokumentation, utbildning och kunskapsöverföring till IT-servicedesk
  
  

**Du har förmodligen:**  

Erfarenhet av projektkoordinering, projektledning eller liknande roll
  
  

Förmåga att hantera flera parallella arbetsuppgifter
  
  

God vana av att agera mellanhand mellan kund och leverantör
  
  

Erfarenhet av arbete i en kundtjänst, gärna inom IT, är meriterande
  
  

Stark kommunikativ förmåga, både på svenska och engelska
  
  

**Du är förmodligen:**  

Lösningsorienterad och driver arbetet framåt när hinder uppstår
  
  

Relationsskapande och trygg i dialog med både kunder och leverantörer
  
  

Strukturerad och noggrann i planering, uppföljning och dokumentation
  
  

Serviceinriktad och lägger stort fokus i att leverera kvalitativ support och lösningar
  
  

Humanit
  
Humanit handlar om att göra saker lite annorlunda, att på riktigt sätta våra anställda i fokus. Vi växer tillsammans och värdesätter engagemang och ambition. För oss är det viktigt att du får chansen att vara med och påverka vägen framåt.
  
I utbyte erbjuder vi kompetens- och karriärutveckling genom varierande och utmanande uppdrag. Vi är inte branschinriktade och kan därför erbjuda en fantastisk variation bland uppdragen för dig som konsult. Självklart ser vi till att du får rätt utbildning och vi är väl medvetna om att det är det livslånga lärandet som bygger vår framgång.
  
Tillsammans skapar vi framtiden
  
  

Tillsvidareanställning med fast månadslön
  
  

Kollektivavtal
  
  

Vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning, inklusive maxat friskvårdsbidrag
  
  

Utvecklingsplan
  
  

Hälsoförsäkring + pension
  
  

Förskottssemester
  
  

**Start:** Omgående med hänsyn till uppsägningstid och när säkerhetskontroll är genomförd. Uppdraget är på heltid och är tillsvidare.
  
**Plats:** Stockholm
  
**Ansökan:** Vi rekryterar löpande. Så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
  
**Sveriges 7:**e bästa arbetsplats 2026! Humanit arbetar tillsammans med Great Place To Work för att vi skall bli Sveriges bästa arbetsplats.
  
  

**Och förresten:**  

Som en aktiv del i ett samhälle med kulturell och social mångfald är Humanit’s ambition att präglas av inkludering och bred representation, samt vara en arbetsplats med lika möjligheter för alla. Humanit anställer, bibehåller, befordrar och i övrigt behandlar alla medarbetare och kandidater efter erfarenhet, kvalifikationer och kompetens, oavsett kön, religion, ursprung, ålder, sexuell läggning, könsidentitet eller funktionsvariationer.

title: Project Engineer - Network & Cyber Security
description:
**Location:**

Landskrona, Skane County, Sweden
**Job ID:**

R0119440
**Date Posted:**

2026-05-21
**Company Name:**

HITACHI ENERGY SWEDEN AB
**Profession (Job Category):**

Engineering & Science
**Job Schedule:**

Full time
**Remote:**

No
**Job Description:**

**The Opportunity**

At Hitachi Energy Cooling Systems, we have global responsibility for the development and manufacturing of highly reliable cooling systems for power electronics and power transmission applications. Our solutions play a critical role in enabling safe, stable, and efficient operation of HVDC and other high‑power installations worldwide.


As power demand and cybersecurity requirements continue to grow, the boundaries between machine OT networks and customer IT environments are becoming increasingly interconnected. We are now looking for a Project Engineer – Network & Cyber Security to strengthen our engineering team in Landskrona.


In this role, you will work close to both technology and projects, acting as a key link between industrial automation systems and customer site networks. You will support secure network design, implementation, and lifecycle management of machine networks, while also serving as a cybersecurity focal point in customer projects. The role combines hands‑on technical work with coordination, documentation, and continuous improvement in a global engineering environment.


**How you’ll make an impact**

* Design and integrate secure network architectures between machine OT environments and customer site IT networks.
* Configure, commission, and support industrial network equipment such as switches, routers, firewalls, and gateways in project deliveries.
* Act as a cybersecurity representative in customer projects, ensuring compliance with internal policies, customer requirements, and applicable regulations.
* Prepare and maintain cybersecurity‑related technical documentation, risk assessments, and compliance evidence.
* Support troubleshooting and incident resolution during commissioning, operation, and lifecycle phases.
* Collaborate closely with automation engineers, customer OT/IT teams, and suppliers to ensure robust and secure system integration.
* Contribute to continuous improvement of network, cybersecurity practices, tools, and ways of working.

**Your background**

* A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical/Electronic Engineering, Industrial Automation, or equivalent practical experience.
* Several years of experience working with industrial networks and cybersecurity in OT/IT environments within sectors such as power transmission, substations, manufacturing, or process industries.
* Solid understanding of industrial networking concepts, including Layer 2/3 networking, segmentation, redundancy, and routing in OT contexts.
* Experience with industrial communication protocols such as IEC 61850, PROFINET, Modbus TCP, OPC UA, EtherNet/IP, or similar.
* Familiarity with industrial cybersecurity principles, standards, and frameworks (e.g. IEC 62443, ISO 27001, NIST, EU CRA).
* A structured, proactive, and collaborative working style, with the ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders.
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken; Swedish language skills are considered a strong advantage.

**Meriting experience**

* Hands‑on experience with PLCs, HMIs, drives, or industrial automation systems.
* Experience with network monitoring, diagnostic, or security assessment tools.
* Certifications such as CCNA/CCNP, CompTIA Network+, or IEC 62443‑related training.
* Exposure to virtualization, high‑availability networks, or secure remote access solutions in industrial environments.

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working time
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

**More about us**

Does the role sound interesting and relevant? Apply today, We review applications on an ongoing basis.  

  



Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Senad Dizdar, +46 (72) 2303665; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, +46 107-38 70 43; Unionen: Claudiu Pop, +46 (10) 7386870. All other questions can be directed to Talent Acquisition Partner Malin Johansson, malin.johansson@hitachienergy.com


*Don’t hesitate – apply today and let us learn more about you and the unique contributions you can bring to our team!*

**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**
