Our mission is to pioneer women’s health through research and passion, empowering every woman with the knowledge she needs to take charge of her health.* 




  





 We're looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to join our Product Growth team with a focus on optimizing the web sign-up funnel. In this role, you will take ownership of the technical direction of our web sign-up experience – shipping high-quality, accessible, and performant user interfaces, and helping more people discover and get started with Natural Cycles.
 



  





 You will play a key role in shaping the first touchpoints of our web experience, working in a fast-paced, data-informed environment where your code has a direct and visible impact on conversion and growth. You will also be a technical mentor for junior engineers on the team and contribute to raising the bar across the codebase.
 



  





**Please note that we are hiring for this role in Sweden.** 




  





**What you will be doing** 



* Owning and driving the technical delivery of the web-based sign-up funnel, from architecture decisions to shipping polished user interfaces.
* Building and running A/B experiments, iterating rapidly based on real-time results and data insights.
* Setting the standard for code quality, performance, and accessibility within the team.
* Mentoring and supporting junior engineers through code reviews, pairing, and technical guidance.
* Collaborating closely with product managers, designers, and analysts to deliver user-facing features of the highest quality.
* Contributing to a healthy, scalable, and sustainable codebase.
* Working hands-on with analytics and data, taking a data-driven approach to frontend decisions wherever possible.
* Ensuring continuous delivery of new releases while working in an agile way.



  





**What skills and experience we think you have** 



* 5+ years of professional experience in frontend development, with a strong portfolio of shipped web products.
* Experience working with backend or full-stack development
* Deep expertise in TypeScript and the Angular framework (or equivalent experience with another modern component-based framework and the ability to ramp up quickly).
* A strong command of modern CSS – Flexbox, Grid, and experience with pre/post-processors such as SASS or PostCSS.
* Solid experience building responsive, performant, accessible, and inclusive user interfaces.
* Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimization.
* Comfort working with data and analytics tools to inform and validate decisions.
* Experience with Git, GitHub, pull requests, and conducting thorough code reviews.
* The ability to communicate clearly and collaborate effectively across disciplines.



  





**It's a plus if you also have** 



* Leadership experience
* Background in growth-focused product teams or experience with web sign-up funnels.
* Commercial acumen and an understanding of business drivers.
* A passion for women's health.



  





**What we offer** 



* Flexible work arrangement - you will be part of a team based in and around Stockholm that values effective collaboration and transparent communication, irrespective of work location
* Professional development - you will collaborate with industry leading developers, promoting continuous growth and skill enhancement
* Modern technology - you will leverage innovative technologies and tools, within an environment that empowers you to contribute ideas and take ownership of your work
* Impactful projects - you will contribute to groundbreaking projects that redefine industry standards and create tangible value
* Commitment to quality - you will join a dynamic and progressive organization that prioritizes profitable, long-term product development



  





**Location** 




 We are remote-friendly, but we find great value in being able to connect with our teams in person.
 **Most of the Product Growth team you will work with is located in Stockholm, and the team occasionally meets in the office for collaboration and face-to-face time.** 




  





**Sounds interesting?** 




 If you want to be part of a successful team, we encourage you to apply for this position as soon as possible.
 



  





 We look forward to hearing from you!
 



  





**How to apply** 




 To apply, just upload your CV and answer the questions on the application form. Keep in mind that we can't accept applications through email because of GDPR, and only applications submitted via the career site (and in English) will be considered.
 



  





 At Natural Cycles we value diversity and inclusion because we know that teams with people from different backgrounds and experiences are stronger. We welcome candidates from all walks of life and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.
 



  





  





**Note: We are not looking for consultants or help from recruitment agencies**

title: Head of Content Design - Electrolux Creative Studio
description:
Marketing
   

  

 Permanent
   

  

**Job Description**
 At Electrolux, we are passionate about improving everyday life for millions of people and the planet. It’s embodied in everything we do. We believe that great tasting food brings people together. That our favorite clothes bring out the best in us. And that the home should be a place for wellbeing, a place to care for ourselves and our loved ones.
   

  

 We have the goal of becoming a world-class consumer marketing company and delivering outstanding consumer experiences linked to product innovation.
   

  

 We are looking for a “Head of Content Design, Electrolux Creative Studio” for Region EMEA to lead a step-change in how our Electrolux and AEG brands connect with consumers—through integrated media, content, and communication that drive both desirability and business performance.
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 As Head of Content Design at Electrolux Creative Studio, you will drive a fundamental transformation of the Marketing function, elevating it into a best‑in‑class engine for creative excellence, content, and activation.
   

  

 You will own the creative and communication agenda end‑to‑end, synchronizing media planning, content production, cultural foresight and AI‑enabled workflows to deliver fewer, bigger and better initiatives with clear business impact across the full consumer journey.
   

  

 This role demands a strong strategic point of view, the ability to influence at the highest levels, and the credibility to elevate Marketing Creativity within enterprise‑level decision‑making. In the position, you work to strengthen owned and earned media storytelling—building long-term brand equity across CRM, social communities, and flagship platforms like Electrolux.com. You own the creative and communication strategy end-to-end, from ideation to execution—ensuring every piece of content reflects our brand’s essence and drives measurable results. Furthermore, you will lead a team of 70+ members across locations in EMEA, fostering a high-performing, collaborative culture that champions creative excellence and continuous learning.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Lead the transformation of Marketing Content Design across EMEA, building a best‑in‑class creative, content, and activation powerhouse.
* Own the creative and communication agenda end‑to‑end, ensuring strategic coherence across the full consumer journey.
* Synchronize media planning, content production, cultural foresight and AI‑enabled workflows to deliver fewer, bigger and higher‑impact initiatives.
* Define and drive an enterprise‑level creative and content strategy with clear, measurable business impact.
* Act as a strategic partner and influencer at senior leadership level, positioning Marketing as a driver of enterprise decision‑making.
* Strengthen owned and earned media storytelling to build long‑term brand equity across CRM, social communities and flagship platforms such as Electrolux.com.
* Own creative and communication strategy from ideation through execution, ensuring all content reflects brand essence and delivers measurable results.
* Champion best‑in‑class content excellence, innovation and activation across channels and markets.
* Lead and develop a distributed team of 70+ employees across EMEA, fostering a high‑performing, collaborative culture rooted in creative excellence and continuous learning.


 This role reports to the VP Marketing & Sustainability EMEA and is a member of the EMEA Marketing Leadership Team.
   

  

**Qualifications:**
* Senior leadership experience in leading international senior marketing teams, including In-House Content Design Creative Studio, communications and creative organizations, preferably within complex, matrixed and international environments in FMCG.
* Proven track record of leading large‑scale transformation and high‑performing, multi‑disciplinary teams through ambiguity.
* Strong background in best‑in‑class marketing strategy, integrated communications and end‑to‑end content ecosystems across owned, earned and paid channels.
* Demonstrated ability to influence at executive level and navigate complex internal, external and enterprise‑wide stakeholder landscapes.
* Senior‑level experience managing and evolving strategic agency ecosystems to deliver consistent creative excellence and impact.


 At Electrolux, we take responsibility for our development in a supportive environment where we embrace our differences and learn from each other. In a truly multicultural setting, we shape living for the better and create remarkable experiences for employees and consumers, all around the globe.
   

  

 Find out more: https://www.linkedin.com/company/electrolux/life/sweden

title: Systemförvaltare Raindance till Ekonomi och Inköp
description:
Vill du arbeta med förvaltning av Karolinska Universitetssjukhusets redovisningssystem Raindance och successivt bidra till dess vidareutveckling? Vi söker en systemförvaltare som vill vara med och driva förbättringar och skapa effektiva, hållbara lösningar som stödjer framtidens sjukvård!
   

  

**Du erbjuds**
* en arbetsplats i en värderingsstyrd verksamhet som gör verklig nytta för samhället
* möjlighet att påverka, bidra och utvecklas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor
* möjlighet att vara med på en spännande förändringsresa där vi formar framtidens sjukvård
* roliga och utvecklande förbättringsprojekt där du bland annat arbetar med införande av nya kundreskontraportaler
* möjlighet att arbeta både i Solna, Huddinge och delvis på distans.


 Självklart får du också ta del av våra generella förmåner som Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset erbjuder dig.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som systemförvaltare hos oss får du en nyckelroll i att utveckla och förvalta redovisningssystemet Raindance. Du arbetar operativt med uppgifter som dagliga avstämningar, användarsupport, versionsuppgraderingar och delaktighet i månadsbokslut.
   

  

 En del i rollen handlar om förbättring och att tillsammans med verksamheten identifiera behov, driva förändring och delta i utvecklingsprojekt som gör skillnad på riktigt. Hos oss blir du en del av ett engagerat team som samarbetar nära för att skapa effektiva och hållbara lösningar i en miljö där utveckling står i fokus.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
* tar initiativ och driver ditt arbete framåt med engagemang och nyfikenhet
* har en god analytisk förmåga och tycker om att lösa problem på ett strukturerat sätt
* samarbetar väl med andra och bidrar till ett positivt arbetsklimat
* arbetar självständigt och tar ansvar för att slutföra dina uppgifter
* planerar och organiserar ditt arbete på ett effektivt sätt och har lätt för att hålla ordning även i komplexa uppgifter.


**Kvalifikationer**
**Krav**
* gymnasieutbildning inom högskoleförberedande program, gärna inom ekonomi, teknik (IT) eller naturvetenskap
* goda kunskaper i Officepaketet
* mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift
* minst tre års erfarenhet av systemförvaltning av affärssystem
* erfarenhet av användarsupport och incidenthantering


**Meriterande**
* tidigare roll som systemförvaltare av Raindance
* utbildning och erfarenhet av redovisningsprocesser som Raindance stödjer, exempelvis kund- och leverantörsreskontra, projekt, bokslut, rapportering och anläggningar
* kunskap om e-fakturor och integration med fakturaväxel
* erfarenhet av inköpsprocesser och arbete med RPA
* eftergymnasial utbildning inom ekonomi eller IT
* erfarenhet av filbaserad systemintegration
* erfarenhet av SQL
* erfarenhet av krav- och testmetodik, projektarbete samt arbete i större organisationer


**Om rekryteringsprocessen**
 Urval och intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande under ansökningstiden.
   

  

 I samband med din ansökan behöver du bifoga CV. Istället för ett personligt brev ber vi dig besvara urvalsfrågor samt kort motivera varför du passar för rollen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan – Tillsammans är vi Karolinska!
   

  

 Inför tillsättning av befattning som innefattar vård av barn och ungdom, kontrolleras den som erbjuds tjänsten mot misstanke- och belastningsregistret. Här kan du läsa mer om rekryteringsprocessen och om vilka kontroller som utförs på Karolinska.
   

  

 Som anställd på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset kan du komma att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om vad det innebär här.
   

  

 Om du är eller tidigare har varit anställd i Region Stockholm kommer vi att ta interna referenser från din nuvarande eller tidigare chef, om du blir aktuell för anställning.
   

  

 För tillsvidaretjänster kan provanställning komma att tillämpas.
   

  

**Om Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset**
 Vi på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset är stolta över att vi är ett av världens främsta universitetssjukhus. Förutom vårt särskilda ansvar för den högspecialiserade vården i Stockholmsregionen är huvuduppdraget att tillsammans med Karolinska Institutet utbilda framtidens vårdanställda och bedriva världsledande forskning samtidigt som vi fortsätter vårt arbete med att utveckla vården för patientens bästa. Vi arbetar inom en rad olika områden och professioner.
   

  

 Vår vision - Vi ska bota och lindra imorgon det ingen kan bota och lindra idag.
   

  

 Läs gärna mer om oss på karolinska.se och följ oss på sociala medier!
   

  

**Stab Ekonomi och inköp**
 För att stödja sjukhusets alla kliniska verksamheter arbetar jurister, ekonomer, kommunikatörer, HR, Inköpare och IT för att vi tillsammans ska generera vård i världsklass och vara en verkligt Attraktiv Arbetsgivare! Här kan du läsa mer om oss.
   

  

**Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm**
 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  

 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  

 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  

 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  

 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm (öppnas i nytt fönster)
   

  

 Fackliga representanter
   

  

 Namn
   

  

 SACO SACO
   

  

 Namn

title: Founding Operator Sweden
description:
**About Gigs**
 At Gigs, we're building the operating system for mobile services—a platform that lets tech companies embed global connectivity into their products effortlessly.
   

  

 Just as Stripe lets any business add a payment button in seconds, Gigs empowers platforms to weave in connectivity—bridging the traditional world of telecom with modern tech. From fintechs launching mobile services to HR platforms offering work phone plans, we automate provisioning and remove telecom complexity.
   

  

 Our team of around 150 people across the US and Europe, backed by nearly $100 million in funding from Ribbit Capital, Google, and Y Combinator. As one of the fastest-growing tech companies, bringing together early-stage engineers, product builders, and business athletes from companies like Stripe, Airbnb, and Shopify. We’re tackling deep technical and regulatory challenges to make connectivity truly seamless.
   

  

 If you’re driven by curiosity, creativity, and the chance to shape the future of telecom, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**Things We Care About**
 We are building in a highly complex space and tackling a massive problem. We want people who lean in when things get hard.
   

  

* **Speed.** 
 We move and we ship. We set bold deadlines and treat every week like it matters.
* **Ownership.** 
 If you see something broken, fix it. We don't wait for permission.
* **Customer Obsession** 
 . Our customers' product is our product.
* **Ambiguity.** 
 We're building frontier technology in a complex domain. You'll need sound judgement and good instincts to make decisions without complete information.
* **First principles.** 
 We don't ask how things have been done before. We ask why they were done that way at all.


 The Role
   

  

 As a Founding Operator at Gigs, you're the founding member of our operations in Sweden.
   

  

 You’re accountable for launching into a country where Gigs has never operated, building the operational foundation from scratch and embedding it into our centralized platform teams. Alongside your GTM counterpart, you’ll build Gigs local presence from zero to an operational, thriving, and compliant business. Replicating our best-practices from existing markets and establishing new ones.
   

  

 You're earning Gigs the right to operate in Sweden and building the engine room the rest of the business runs on. You're the one person who holds the full operational and regulatory picture in-country, and the local face of Gigs to regulators, carriers, and infrastructure partners. As the business grows, you'll have the opportunity to build a local team around you and shape how operations function in Sweden for the long run.
   

  

**Salary range:**
* **EU:** 
 €130,000 - 170,000


*(The final offer depends on your background, skills, and how you perform through the process. We're open to considering outlier candidates, which may result in an adjustment to the scope and compensation)*
 What You Will Do
   

  

* Own the end-to-end operational and regulatory launch plan for Sweden: sequencing workstreams, tracking milestones, surfacing risks before they become delays
* Stand up the operational foundation: legal entity setup, billing and tax structure, data compliance, local ops infrastructure, testing, and any market-specific product requirements
* Lead the regulatory entry process: map required authorizations (MVNO/reseller, local entity, etc.), build the in-country regulator relationship, and drive approvals to completion
* Coordinate across internal specialists - supply, legal, finance, product, engineering - to keep all teams aligned, unblocked, and moving to the same timeline. Partner closely with the GTM Lead Sweden so operational readiness and commercial launch move in lockstep
* Own the long-term operational relationship with our local carrier and vendor partners - integration, SLAs, ongoing performance, commercial reviews, and escalations
* Build and document the market playbook so each launch is faster and smarter than the last
* Define what "success" looks like for the market from launch to scale


 What We Are Looking For
   

  

* 5+ years of experience in market expansion, operations, or consulting at a high-growth tech company, ideally in fintech, payments, or telecom (or another regulated vertical where you had to earn the right to operate)
* A track record of launching something from zero: you've owned a market, country, or product launch end-to-end and had a real outcome to defend
* Structured and relentless as a project driver: you hold multiple parallel workstreams (regulatory, technical, commercial, people) without losing the thread, and surface blockers before they become delays
* Analytically sharp and decisive: you make sound calls with incomplete information, document your reasoning, and adjust fast when you're wrong
* Direct experience operating across multiple countries or jurisdictions is required; candidates without genuine international operational experience will struggle in this role
* Can easily flex between driving in granular government licensing meetings and cross-functional planning sessions.
* Fluent in Swedish and Engish (required); additional European or globally relevant languages are a plus


 Work At Gigs
   

  

 At Gigs, we value in-person collaboration. We believe the best ideas, decisions, and relationships are built when teams spend meaningful time together, and our culture is designed around that belief. We support flexibility where it makes sense. Some focused work can be done remotely, and not every role or week looks the same.
 **You should expect regular time in one of our** 
**hubs** 
 , as well as occasional travel for team workshops, customer meetings, and
 **Gigs Republic, our bi-annual company off-site** 
 . Our offices are designed to feel like home-inspired workspaces, with plants, thoughtful tools, and small, tight-knit teams that make collaboration feel natural, energizing, and effective.
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

 At Gigs, we believe in rewarding excellence. We offer competitive compensation and stock options because we see you as a true partner in our growth. We also provide stipends for your home office or work setup, a budget for learning and development to fuel your career, and of course, a free phone and international data plan
   

  

*Want to learn more about our benefits, hubs, and what it’s like to work at Gigs? Check out our Careers page.*

title: Verksamhetsnära IT‑specialist – Swift & finansiella meddelanden
description:
Vill du arbeta i hjärtat av bankens globala betalningsinfrastruktur och bidra till en av Sveriges mest kritiska Swift‑miljöer? Vi söker dig som vill ta ansvar i en komplex och affärskritisk miljö.
   

  

**Ditt team**
 Vi ansvarar för Handelsbankens globala Swift‑plattform samt våra system för sanktionsscreening och matchning. Dessa system utgör centrala delar av bankens kommunikationsflöden mot andra banker och finansiella institut. Vårt område hanterar stora volymer, höga säkerhetskrav och ett systemlandskap där varje komponent kan likställas med ett eget system.
   

  

 Du kommer arbeta i ett team bestående av 7-8 personer, både med djup teknisk och affärskompetens. Teamet leds av en produktägare och en team coach. Totalt består gruppen av 22 personer.
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt i enlighet med bankens utvecklingsmodell. Du kommer samarbeta med ditt närmaste team, andra kollegor i vårt tåg, andra utvecklingståg och stödjande enheter samt bankens affärsområden. Vi arbetar i sprintar och PI‑planeringar, och stöttar hela banken – från betalningar och värdepapper till fondhandel och interna affärsenheter. Rollen innebär även samarbete med våra leverantörer.
   

  

 Miljön är komplex, men också unik och utvecklande. Här finns möjligheten att arbeta med en modern Swift‑plattform, nära andra banker och internationella aktörer, och i en miljö där stabilitet, säkerhet och precision är avgörande.
   

  

**Din roll**
 I den här rollen blir du en nyckelperson i bankens Swift‑miljö och våra system för sanktionsscreening och matchning. Du arbetar nära både verksamheten och IT och driver frågor från behovsanalys till färdig lösning. Rollen är bred och varierad, med stort ansvar och stora möjligheter att påverka hur våra kritiska flöden utvecklas och förvaltas.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Analysera verksamhetens behov och omsätta dem till krav och lösningar inom Swift, sanktionsscreening och matchning.
* Delta i framtagande, implementation och test av nya funktioner och förbättringar.
* Vara en central kontaktpunkt mellan affären, IT och våra leverantörer.
* Stötta affärsenheter och interna team i systemrelaterade frågor, inklusive behörigheter, support och beredskap.
* Arbeta med incident-, problem- och förändringshantering i en miljö där stabilitet är avgörande.
* Bidra till efterlevnad av interna och externa regelverk, inklusive återkommande granskningar.
* Leda initiativ och driva arbetsuppgifter från start till mål i en komplex och modern Swift‑miljö.


**Din profil**
 För att lyckas i den här rollen behöver du vara en person som trivs i komplexa miljöer och som har lätt för att röra dig mellan verksamhet och teknik. Du är trygg i att ta ansvar, driva frågor självständigt och samtidigt samarbeta nära kollegor, leverantörer och affärsenheter. Rollen kräver både struktur och nyfikenhet, och en vilja att förstå hur våra kritiska flöden hänger ihop och påverkar bankens vardag.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har med dig följande:
   

  

* Gedigen erfarenhet av att arbeta med förvaltning och utveckling av affärskritiska system.
* Förståelse för systemintegrationer (API:er, filöverföring, meddelandeköer).
* Erfarenhet av kravhantering – från insamling och analys till prioritering och uppföljning.
* Förmåga att läsa och förstå teknisk dokumentation.
* Vana att arbeta med incident-, problem- och förändringshantering.
* Erfarenhet av testplanering och test.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska.


 Utöver detta ser vi gärna att du har erfarenhet från bank och finans, särskilt inom Swift eller närliggande områden som sanktionsscreening och matchning. Har du arbetat nära leverantörer, i agila team eller med IT‑ och informationssäkerhet är det en klar fördel. Erfarenhet av regelverksgranskningar, dokumentation av processer och arbete i komplexa systemlandskap är också värdefullt. Relevant högskoleutbildning är meriterande.
   

  

 Minst lika viktigt är hur du är som person. Vi tror att du är lösningsorienterad och tar initiativ när något behöver drivas framåt. Du har lätt att kommunicera tydligt och strukturerat, och kan sammanfatta komplex information på ett sätt som gör den begriplig för olika målgrupper. Du är analytisk, värderar information noggrant och bygger förståelse för helheten.
   

  

 Samtidigt är du samarbetsorienterad, transparent och inkluderande – en person som delar med sig, bygger nätverk och bidrar till ett tryggt och öppet teamklimat. Kort sagt: du är någon som både vill och vågar växa i en miljö där du gör verklig skillnad.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
*Som ett steg i Handelsbankens rekryteringsprocess krävs en godkänd bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidat, utförd av en extern part, innan anställning kan ske.*
**Kontaktuppgifter**
**Rekryterande chef:** 
 Mathias Wiklund, mathias.wiklund@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Talent Acquisition Partner:** 
 Henrik Alm, henrik.alm2@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Finansförbundet:** 
 Maria Forsberg, maria.forsberg@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen:** 
 Cecilia Zielfelt, cecilia.zielfelt@handelsbanken.se

title: Senior/Principal Simulation Engineer (Robotics)
description:
We are
 **Stax** 
 , a deeptech executive search firm specialising in placing world-class deep tech talent. On behalf of one of our premier clients—a pioneering
 **industrial AI and robotics powerhouse** 
 sparking a new western industrial revolution—we are headhunting a Senior
 **Systems & Simulation Engineer** 
 .
 



  





 They are building “Local Factory-as-a-Service”: a network of autonomous, local micro-factories, all powered by Physical AI turning low-volume assembly from a massive capital expense into a simple, on-demand utility.
 



  





 They are building the critical infrastructure needed to close the "Physical AI Deployment Gap." They pair cutting-edge, stochastic generative models with strict, deterministic execution to make agentic AI work at scale. Operating as a venture-backed, high-conviction startup, they offer top-tier compensation and true founding-team ownership with a CEO with previous exits.
 



  





 📍 Role Logistics
 


* **Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (Confidential central hub)
* **Type:** 
 Full-time
* **Work Model:** 
 Hybrid



  





 🎯 The Mission
 



 As the Systems & Simulation Engineer, you will architect the digital twin platform and the stochastic, agentic layer running on top of it. You will own the convergence point where deterministic supervisor layers, learned policies (manipulation and motion), and live physical states of real robots collide.
 


* **Architect** 
 closed-loop digital twins (using NVIDIA Isaac Lab/Sim or MuJoCo) as training grounds for VLA policies.
* **Bridge Sim-to-Real:** 
 Model accurate contact dynamics to ensure reinforcement and imitation learning policies survive the physical world.
* **Pioneer AI Paradigms:** 
 Integrate World Models and LLM-driven agents for zero-shot task planning, semantic reasoning, and humanoid locomotion.
* **Build Infrastructure:** 
 Write high-performance Python/C++ to support automated synthetic data generation pipelines.



  





 👤 Your Profile
 


* **Education:** 
 PhD or Master’s in Robotics, AI, Computer Science, or a related engineering field.
* **Core Tech Stack:** 
 Expert programming in Python/C++ with hands-on ROS2 and physics simulator experience (Isaac Sim/Lab, MuJoCo).
* **AI Expertise:** 
 Proven experience applying RL, Imitation Learning, or Embodied AI to multi-robot systems, locomotion, or complex manipulation.
* **The Builder Mindset:** 
 A history of building complex digital twins from scratch. You carry practical "battle scars" from sim-to-real transfer and value rapid iteration over writing "perfect" code.



  





 💼 What is on Offer
 


* **Founding Team Status:** 
 A highly significant, early-stage equity grant, making you a true owner of the business.
* **Premium Compensation:** 
 Top-tier Stockholm salary package.
* **Massive Impact:** 
 Direct influence over the core architecture of a scaling, next-generation micro-factory space.



  





 📥 To Apply or Discuss Confidentially:
 



 Are you ready to build the architecture that moves AI from digital pixels into physical atoms? Message
 **Stax** 
 directly to initiate a confidential conversation.

title: Senior Product Owner, App Core Services
description:
**Job Description**
*The future of gaming in Finland is changing – and we’re recruiting. In 2027, the Finnish license market will open, bringing a new era for iGaming. At Veikkaus, we’re preparing for this transformation - and we’re looking for passionate professionals to join us on this exciting journey.*
*We’re strengthening our Betting and iCasino teams with true iGaming experts: people with international experience, a hunger for success, and a persistent drive to win. If you’re ready to help shape the future of responsible, competitive money gaming, now is the time to join us.*
*Veikkaus is a gaming company for everyone, striving to be better in every aspect. Our passion is to drive better gaming so that our customers can enjoy every moment. Caring, teamwork, and courage are the values that guide everything we do. Responsibility is a core of our operations. Our goal is to be a respected and successful international money gaming group that continuously improves while always putting both customers and employees first.
 **For a better game** 
 — and working life.*
**Senior Product Owner, App Core Services**
 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Product Owner - App Core Services** 
 to join our Digital Channels Product team and play a key role in shaping and growing our native iOS and Android apps experiences and their overall performance. The role guides channel framework for our apps and ensure apps front-end efforts are aligned with Digital Channels’ overall goals and long-term product vision. Working closely with cross-functional teams, you’ll plan app-exclusive features, translate business and player needs into clear priorities, guide roadmap execution and releases, and ensure measurable improvements to the app core services experience in line with Veikkaus’ commitment to responsible and sustainable gaming. The role also oversees our app store presence on Apple and Google, and involves close collaboration with Product, Marketing, UX, Tech, and Data teams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Guide and oversee the roadmap and performance of our apps.
* Own and manage the app core services product backlog and oversee priorities to balance short-term delivery needs with long-term objectives.
* Plan app launches and updates and manage our app store presence on Apple and Google, overseeing performance and compliance in close collaboration with business and commercial stakeholders.
* Collaborate in defining and prioritizing app core services requirements (including app-exclusive features) aligned with business objectives and customer goals.
* Gather and translate complex front-end requirements and business needs into actionable epics that align with long-term roadmap while enabling short-term delivery.
* Lead cross-functional collaboration to ensure delivery outcomes match business strategy.
* Monitor and analyze key metrics and KPIs to drive continuous improvement in app engagement and app store performance.
* Contribute to long-term planning for the evolution of our digital channels, supporting scalable, responsible, and innovative player experiences.
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders, UX, and technical teams to ensure successful delivery of agreed high-quality outcomes.


**Qualifications And Experience**
* 5+ years of experience driving mobile apps and multi-platform products, with strong knowledge of app stores and iOS/Android requirements.
* Strong experience in product ownership or business analysis with front-end focus.
* Strong skills in backlog management, requirements translation, and cross-functional coordination.
* Deep expertise in app-first products and engagement models, with experience managing and growing iOS and Android apps, including app store processes and performance metrics.
* Experience with agile delivery practices and customer journey optimization.
* Experience in the iGaming industry is a strong advantage.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Digital Strategy, Product Management, or related field.


**We offer you**
* A workplace where the game evolves – and so do you. You’ll face meaningful challenges and gain new skills while contributing to shared success – in Finland and beyond. We value curiosity and create the space for it to thrive.
* Inspiring and supportive teammates you can rely on. The best ideas and world-class entertainment are built together – and Veikkaus thrives because of its people.
* Balanced and inspiring work life. At Veikkaus, we believe a good job adds something to life – but isn’t all there is to it.
* Excellent employee benefits. You can read more about us and our benefits from here.


 It is important to us that everyone can come to work as their authentic selves. We value diverse backgrounds, skills, and perspectives, and believe that success comes from working in diverse teams. We encourage individuals from various backgrounds to apply for our jobs.
   

  

 The position is located at Veikkaus’ headquarters in Pohjois-Haaga, Helsinki. We work in a flexible hybrid model, and the role can also be performed remotely from Malta or Stockholm/Sweden.
   

  

**Interested?** 
 Awesome! Please send your application with CV and salary request no later than
 **24.05.2026** 
 . We are excited to hear from you!
   

  

 If you have any questions about the position, feel free to reach out to
 **Niam Bezzina, Head of Product, Digital Channels** 
 at firstname.lastname@veikkaus.fi.
   

  

*A drug test under Section 7 of the Act on the Protection of Privacy in Working Life (759/2004) will be conducted on the selected candidate.*
**About Us**
 Veikkaus is the gaming company for everyone. We’re dedicated to developing responsible and entertaining gambling experiences. At Veikkaus, you’ll find meaningful roles, opportunities to grow, and a workplace where care, collaboration, and courage shape everyday life. We believe everyone should be able to develop, succeed, and be themselves – while building shared success together.
   

  

 For a better game – and a better working life.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
**Job Description:**
 Want to create the world’s best mobile games?
   

  

 We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Kingdom. Our games are adored by hundreds of millions of people, and you’ll be helping build them, as well as contributing to the engine, systems and platforms that make them play brilliantly on any platform.
   

  

 Your role within the Kingdom
   

  

 If you want to create amazing user experiences and entertainment for millions of players on the go, this is the right job for you. As part of the Central Technology team in Candy Crush Soda Saga, you will both design Soda’s long‑term architecture and bring it to life by implementing end‑to‑end systems directly in our client codebase. This role bridges big‑picture system design with hands‑on development, ensuring robust, maintainable, and high‑performance solutions. You’ll also be the one to deliver reference implementations that teams can immediately adopt across the codebase.
   

  

 Working closely with the tech leadership team, you will shape Soda’s technical strategy and ensure our architecture continues to evolve to support future success. Along the way, you’ll enjoy a creative, collaborative environment where your ideas are valued as much as your technical expertise.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Auditing Soda’s architecture, designing new systems, and improving existing ones
* Taking full ownership of new systems from concept through production‑ready code, delivering examples for adoption across the client codebase
* Collaborating with the rest of the Technical Leadership in Soda to align on strategy
* Contributing high‑quality, well‑structured code to the client codebase
* Coaching colleagues and serving as a role model for technical excellence in areas like code quality, design, and collaboration


 Skills to create thrills
   

  

 We equally value a passion for making great games, extensive hands‑on coding experience, strength in software architecture, and a knack for sharing great ideas. You are:
   

  

* Highly proficient in system design, with proven experience architecting large and complex systems
* Very strong in C++, with experience working in large codebases
* Skilled at balancing architectural vision with pragmatic delivery, ensuring designs translate into production‑ready solutions
* Passionate about games and would love to help create the next big thing
* Driven by quality, polish, and pride in the solutions you deliver
* Proactive in taking technical ownership from design to implementation


**Bonus Points (nice To Have, Not Required)**
* Experience in the gaming industry
* Experience with Android or iOS development
* Experience working with memory‑ or performance‑critical applications
* Experience developing tools with scripting languages


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Forward Deployed Patent Attourney
description:
In a world where products and software can be replicated overnight, intellectual property is the last durable moat. Every breakthrough in AI, biotech, clean energy, and autonomous systems depends on patent protection to survive. Yet the system meant to protect these innovations hasn't kept up.
   

  

 Stilta exists to fix that: we build agentic AI for intellectual property, creating the technology that will finally modernize how the world’s most important ideas are defended.
   

  

 We just closed one of the largest seed rounds in Y Combinator, backed by top Silicon Valley investors. We already work with several of the world’s largest IP firms and Global Fortune 500 companies, and are growing rapidly.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We're hiring a patent professional who wants to shape the future of their field, not just practice in it. You'll be the domain authority inside the company: the person who knows what "good" looks like and makes sure our AI meets that bar. You'll lead the domain side of customer engagements with top IP firms and Fortune 500 IP teams, turn real litigation workflows into product, and work directly with engineering to improve how our agents reason about claims, prior art, and infringement.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Join enterprise demos and pilots as the domain expert
* Onboard customers: train teams, configure workflows, ensure first-week value
* Set and enforce the quality standard for AI-generated analysis - claim charts, prior art mappings, infringement assessments - against the bar you know from practice
* Translate what patent professionals need under real pressure into product decisions and feature priorities
* Work with engineering to improve how our agents reason about claims, prior art, and infringement


**What we are looking for**
* 2+ years of patent experience - litigation and invalidity experience is a plus, but we value anyone who has done serious patent work and knows what quality looks like
* Have personally drafted claim charts and conducted prior art searches
* Curious about AI and ready to be hands-on in shaping how it handles the work you have been doing manually
* You want ownership and impact, not billable hours


 What we can offer
   

  

* Competitive Salary + Equity
* Unlimited Claude Code - experiment with AI‑assisted workflows, prototypes, and automations from day one
* Sponsored VISA
* A front row seat - you will be shaping the foundation of our business


*Stilta are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, or background. Selection for this role will be based solely on suitability for the position and does not discriminate on any protected characteristic.*

title: Senior Android Engineer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
**Application deadline:** 
 27-05-2026
   

  

* You are a Senior Android Engineer with 8+ years of Android development experience.
* You have experience with agentic tools, and are an engineer who adopts agentic-first development. Having prior experience with agentic tools like Claude and Cursor is crucial.
* You are an inclusive colleague and a true great teammate.
* You love to collaborate with your colleagues and have a mindset for continuous improvement.
* You have a deep understanding and experience of modern Android development and best practices.
* You care about quality and you know what it means to ship high-quality code.
* You know how to write readable, idiomatic and maintainable Kotlin (and Java) and are willing to follow already defined coding guidelines and workflows.
* You have a deep understanding of Android architecture patterns and API design.
* You understand how mobile applications connect with backend systems end-to-end.
* Having some working experience with C++ or iOS development is a big plus, as you may occasionally build features that span across platforms and codebases.
* You value team success over personal success.
* You value continuing learning and incentivising others to do the same in the process.


**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Client Executive Public Sector
description:
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**
 At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.
   

  

 Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 As a
 **Client Executive (CE)** 
 , you will lead sales activities across the
 **Public Sector in Sweden** 
 , driving sustainable growth and achieving your assigned sales quota.
   

  

 You will orchestrate and align all sales and pre‑sales stakeholders involved in your accounts, ensuring seamless collaboration to expand NetApp’s presence and deliver measurable value to public sector customers.
   

  

 As a trusted advisor to senior government and public‑sector leaders, you will apply your business acumen and technical insight to uncover opportunities, guide strategic discussions, and maximize revenue across your portfolio.
   

  

 Job Responsibilities
   

  

* Build detailed relationship maps within your accounts and define plans to deepen and broaden engagement with key decision‑makers, influencers, and stakeholders across the Public Sector.
* Develop strategic account plans and collaborate closely with Account Technology Specialists to shape long‑term technology roadmaps for both new and existing NetApp solutions.
* Lead and coordinate the full sales cycle, including pipeline creation, qualification, solution positioning, pricing, quoting, and contract negotiation.
* Act as the central sales orchestrator, ensuring the right experts are engaged at the right time to deliver maximum customer value.
* Manage multiple parallel sales motions while maintaining a customer‑centric approach and enabling specialists to identify and pursue additional opportunities.
* Drive partner co‑selling activities within your accounts, ensuring strong alignment and joint value creation.
* Support the onboarding, development, and activation of new partners within the Swedish Public Sector ecosystem.
* Acquire new Public Sector customers and expand business within existing accounts through value‑led engagement and strategic growth initiatives.


 Job Requirements
   

  

* Minimum of 5 years of sales experience in data center, cloud, or modern infrastructure technologies
* Proven experience working with Swedish Public Sector organizations is essential, including an understanding of procurement processes, frameworks, and decision‑making structures
* Demonstrated track record of exceeding quota and driving net‑new business within complex, multi‑stakeholder environments
* Strong ability to build, nurture, and sustain trusted relationships with public‑sector customers and strategic partners
* Proactive, opportunity‑driven approach with a focus on expanding market presence and identifying new areas of value for government and public institutions
* Deep understanding of customer goals and the ability to translate technical capabilities into clear business outcomes
* Highly organized and disciplined, with the capability to lead and coordinate multiple parallel sales motions together with specialists and partners
* Ability to communicate credibly about modern computing, storage, cloud, and hybrid‑infrastructure concepts
* Fluent in Swedish and English


 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Automation Consultant
description:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com
   

  

 Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.
   

  

 Vill du ta nästa steg som automationskonsult och arbeta med moderna lösningar i spännande kunduppdrag? Då är denna roll för dig! Vi på Vivicta söker nu en erfaren
 **Automation Consultant** 
 med fokus på lösningar baserade på UiPath och Microsoft Power Automate. I rollen samarbetar du i ett globalt team, nära verksamheten för att identifiera möjligheter, bygga skalbara automationer och stötta hela implementationen – från idé till produktion.
   

  

**Som  Automation Consultant** 
**på** 

**Vivicta** 

**kommer du** 

**att** 
  

  

* Arbeta tillsammans med verksamhetsintressenter för att identifiera och bedöma automationsmöjligheter.
* Designa, bygga, testa och driftsätta automationer i UiPath och Power Automate (moln och desktop).
* Skapa återanvändbara komponenter, mallar och standarder.
* Integrera lösningar med affärssystem (t.ex. SAP), webbaserade system och API:er.
* Använda AI‑funktionalitet (OCR/IDP, OpenAI, AI Builder) där det skapar mervärde.
* Ansvara för produktionssupport: övervaka, felsöka och åtgärda problem snabbt.
* Säkerställa tydlig dokumentation för både utveckling och förvaltning.
* Följa säkerhets‑, styrnings‑ och compliance‑krav.
* Samarbeta med verksamhet, IT och infrastrukturteam globalt.
* Stödja pre‑sales genom lösningsdesign, scope‑arbete och kostnadsestimat.
* Resor till kund kan förekomma.


**Vi söker dig som** 
  

  

* Är en tydlig och trygg kommunikatör med vana att leda dialoger med kund.
* Är flexibel och bekväm med att arbeta i olika automationsverktyg och teknologier.
* Har ett konsultativt förhållningssätt och är proaktiv samt lösningsorienterad.
* Behärskar flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Har en kandidatexamen inom relevant område.
* Har certifieringar inom UiPath och Power Automate.


**Det är meriterande om du också har**
* Har erfarenhet av Python, Robot Framework, andra RPA‑verktyg och/eller PowerShell.


**Vi erbjuder** 

**dig**
 Vi erbjuder dig professionell tillväxt, meningsfulla projekt, öppen kultur och en enastående balans mellan arbete och privatliv! Vi erbjuder dig en möjlighet att skapa framtiden för en snabbt växande och viktig sektor. Vi tror att vår organisationskultur är en viktig del för att du ska bli framgångsrik. Vi tillhandahåller en flexibel hybrid arbetsmodell som en del av vår kultur och vårt sätt att arbeta. Slutligen tror vi också på nyfikenhet och konstant lärande som en livsstil där du behöver skola om dig varje dag när nya möjligheter dyker upp.
   

  

**Hur du ansöker**
 Bifoga ditt CV eller LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmanar dig att söka redan idag. Om du har några frågor angående denna roll, vänligen kontakta anställande chef,  Anna Ryan, anna.ryan@vivicta.com.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

*Plats: Stockholm* 
*/Göteborg/Malmö/Örebro, hybrid*
*Vi genomför bakgrundskontroller på alla slutkandidater, och vissa roller kan kräva säkerhetsprövning antingen under rekryteringen eller senare — alltid i enlighet med lokal lagstiftning samt med stor omsorg och konfidentialitet.*
*Vivicta* 

*tackar nej till samtal från rekryteringsföretag.*

title: Senior Operational Technology (OT) Architect – Technical Authority
description:
We are seeking a Senior Operational Technology (OT) Architect – Technical Authority to define, govern, and evolve the OT architecture across our renewable energy portfolio.
   

  

**A Technical Authority Is Expected To**
* Own architecture and standards across the domain
* Act as escalation point for complex system decisions
* Drive roadmap alignment and governance
* Ensure competence development and consistency across teams


 This is not only a design role. You will act as a technical authority for SCADA and OT systems, setting standards, guiding engineering teams, and ensuring consistent, high-quality solutions across projects and assets.
   

  

 You will play a central role in building and developing technical competencies within Operational Technology in BA Wind, ensuring that our solutions are robust, secure, and scalable while enabling operational excellence.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
 As a Senior OT Architect / Technical Authority, you will:
   

  

 Architecture & Governance
   

  

* Define, maintain, and enforce the OT architecture strategy for SCADA and automation systems
* Establish and govern reference architectures, standards, and design principles across all assets
* Act as the technical escalation point for complex system and integration decisions
* Ensure alignment of architectures across projects, assets, and business units


 Technical Authority & Capability Building
   

  

* Act as Technical Authority for SCADA and OT systems, ensuring consistency and quality of engineering deliverables
* Guide, coach, and challenge engineering teams to improve technical solutions and design decisions
* Drive competence development within OT engineering teams (methods, tools, best practices)
* Translate complex technical topics into clear guidance for both engineers and stakeholders


 Engineering & Delivery Support
   

  

* Lead the design and integration of Level 1 SCADA systems from major OEMs (Siemens, Vestas, GE, Nordex)
* Support project teams with solution design, trade-offs, and technical decision-making
* Drive standardization and interoperability across multi-vendor SCADA platforms
* Provide technical leadership in vendor selection, system upgrades, and lifecycle management


 Technology Leadership
   

  

* Own and maintain the OT technology and architecture roadmap
* Ensure cybersecurity-by-design and compliance with regulatory standards
* Support digitalisation initiatives, including OT/IT integration and data enablement
* Identify and drive adoption of emerging technologies and automation trends


**Qualifications**
**Experience & Expertise**
* Have extensive experience in OT architecture within renewable energy, with deep SCADA expertise
* Bring proven experience acting as a senior technical lead, architect, or authority across multiple systems or projects
* Have strong hands-on knowledge of Level 1 SCADA systems (Siemens, Vestas, GE, Nordex)
* Understand industrial communication protocols (IEC 61850, OPC UA, Modbus) and OT cybersecurity


 Leadership & Impact
   

  

* Demonstrate the ability to guide, influence, and challenge engineering teams without direct line authority
* Are able to translate complex technical concepts into clear and actionable guidance
* Have experience driving standardisation, governance, and cross-team alignment


 Architecture & Systems Thinking
   

  

* Strong knowledge of architecture frameworks (ISA‑95, IEC 62443)
* Proven track record of designing scalable, secure, and resilient OT solutions
* Experience working across multiple projects, ensuring consistency and reuse


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Experience integrating OT with cloud and data platforms
* Knowledge of asset management systems and digital twin approaches
* Experience working in a Technical Authority / domain lead setup


 Additional Information
   

  

**Our offer**
 Good remuneration, a challenging and international work environment, and the possibility to work with some of the best in the field. You will be working in interdisciplinary teams and you can always count on support from committed colleagues. We offer attractive employment conditions and opportunities for personal and professional development.
   

  

**More Information**
 We welcome your application in English, no later than 14/06/2026. We kindly request that you do not send applications by any means other than via our website as we cannot guarantee that we will be able to process applications that are not made via our website.
   

  

 For more information about the recruitment process you are welcome to contact our recruiter Adam Hammond via adam.hammond@vattenfall.com
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity**
 Vattenfall is committed to promoting a diverse and inclusive community - a place where we can all be ourselves and succeed on merit. We offer a range of family friendly, inclusive employment policies, flexible working arrangements, staff engagement forums and services to support all our employees.
   

  

 We are convinced that diversity contributes to build a more profitable and attractive company and we strive to be good role model regarding diversity. Vattenfall works actively for all employees to have the same opportunities and rights regardless of gender, ethnicity, age, transgender identity or expression, religion or other belief, disability or sexual orientation.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**
**Company Description**
 Vattenfall is a European energy company with approximately 21000 employees. For more than 100 years we have electrified industries, supplied energy to people’s homes and modernized our way of living through innovation and cooperation. We now want to make fossil-free living possible within one generation. To be able to reach this ambitious goal we are looking for talented individuals who, in addition to their passion for their own role, also have strong team spirit and want to contribute to supporting a meaningful corporate mission.

title: Strategisk Inköpare
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en
 **Strategisk Inköpare** 
 hos vår kund.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Driva och genomföra sourcingprojekt och aktiviteter
   

  

 Leda samarbete och kommunikation med tvärfunktionella team globalt samt samverka med relevanta intressenter
   

  

 Implementera kategoristrategier
   

  

 Ansvara för kommersiella leverantörsrelationer
   

  

 Hantera leverantörsstyrning och avtal
   

  

 Leverera värde genom förbättrad prestation, efterlevnad och kostnadsreducering
   

  

 Delta i utvecklingsresan mot Operational Excellence och en världsledande inköpsorganisation
   

  

 Under 2021 startades ett omfattande Procurement Excellence-program som kommer att pågå under flera år med målet att utveckla verksamheten till en världsledande inköpsorganisation.
   

  

 Resor inom Sverige kan förekomma i rollen.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker en affärsdriven och kommersiellt fokuserad strategisk inköpare med dokumenterad erfarenhet av att genomföra och leverera resultat inom sourcing och inköp. Du trivs med att leda sourcingaktiviteter och att samarbeta med både interna intressenter och leverantörer.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen behöver du ha mycket god kommunikativ och förhandlingsmässig förmåga samt kunna hantera avtal och leverantörsrelationer självständigt. Vi värdesätter även egenskaper som öppenhet, samarbetsförmåga, självdriv, struktur och analytiskt tänkande samt en stark vilja att nå uppsatta mål.
   

  

**Krav**
 Masterexamen, relevant högskoleutbildning eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
   

  

 Flera års erfarenhet av inköp inom mjukvara och IT
   

  

 Stark affärsförståelse och kommersiellt driv
   

  

 Gedigen erfarenhet av inköp av mjukvara och applikationer
   

  

 God kunskap om mjukvaru- och IT-marknaden, leverantörer, lösningar och affärsmodeller
   

  

 Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift
   

  

 Meriterande
   

  

 Erfarenhet inom Procurement eller Supply Chain
   

  

 Erfarenhet av att leda kommersiella team
   

  

 Intresse för kontinuerliga förbättringar och digitalisering
   

  

 Tjänsten kräver att du genomgår säkerhetsprövning enligt gällande säkerhetsskyddsbestämmelser. För vissa säkerhetsklassade tjänster kan särskilda krav på medborgarskap förekomma.
   

  

 Om verksamheten
   

  

 Bakom innovationerna står människorna som gör dem möjliga – modiga pionjärer, nyfikna problemlösare och engagerade specialister. Här arbetar människor med olika kompetenser och perspektiv tillsammans för att skapa lösningar som gör skillnad.
   

  

 Organisationen är verksam inom försvars- och säkerhetsområdet och utvecklar avancerade tekniska system inom bland annat flyg, sensorer, ledningssystem och undervattensteknik. Verksamheten bedrivs globalt med huvudkontor i Sverige.
   

  

**Övrigt**
**Uppdragsstart:** 
 2026-08-01
   

  

**Uppdragslängd:** 
 2027-01-31
   

  

**Område:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Svar senast:** 
 2026-06-22
   

  

 Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.
   

  

 Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: AV Architect
description:
Join Dustin as an AV Architect and work hands-on with some of the market’s leading collaboration technologies. In this role, you will combine technical expertise, quality ownership, and close teamwork to deliver reliable AV solutions that make a real impact for customers every day.
   

  

**This is what makes the position as AV Architect unique**
* Work hands-on with leading collaboration platforms such as Microsoft Teams Rooms, Zoom Rooms, and Google Meet, gaining broad and future-proof AV expertise.
* Take ownership of pre-configuration, testing, and validation, directly contributing to higher quality deliveries and a better end-user experience.
* Play a key role in modern AV deployments with clear technical responsibility and visible impact from device setup to system readiness.


 The Hiring Manager for this role is
 **Jerker Andersson** 
 ,
 **Manager Service Delivery AV at Dustin** 
 . As a leader, he encourages ownership and collaboration, empowering his team to take initiative, share knowledge, and continuously grow their technical expertise while delivering high-quality AV solutions together.
   

  

 You will join a highly skilled and collaborative AV team where knowledge sharing, teamwork, and mutual support are part of the everyday culture. Led by Jerker Andersson, the team combines strong technical expertise with a high level of trust, ownership, and collaboration to deliver the best possible results together.
   

  

**Your role & influence as AV Architect**
*Responsibility* 
 : You will be given responsibility for ensuring that room-based AV and collaboration systems are fully configured, tested, and ready for reliable customer deployment.
   

  

*Collaboration* 
 : Together with your team, you take care of delivering high-quality and fully validated collaboration solutions. You'll work closely not only with your immediate team members but also with the Installation and Sales departments to ensure smooth and successful customer deliveries.
   

  

*Core activities:*
* Configure, test, and validate Microsoft Teams Rooms, Zoom Rooms, and Google Meet room solutions before deployment.
* Prepare and pre-configure AV equipment, including quality checks, troubleshooting, and system documentation.
* Support installation and delivery activities by collaborating with installation teams and participating in on-site commissioning when needed.


**Benefits Of Joining Dustin**
 We believe there's more to Dustin than just the benefits listed here. You'll fully understand this once you're with us. Curious? Our Life at Dustin page has you covered.
   

  

**You can find more of our benefits below in the vacancy.**
**This Is What We Imagine You Bring**
 We envision you as a curious and driven individual with hands-on experience in modern AV and collaboration technology, who enjoys solving technical challenges and delivering high-quality solutions while working independently as well as while effectively collaborating with others.
   

  

 Additionally, it's important that you bring:
   

  

* High level of independent thinking, structured approach and technical reasoning.
* Experience with professional AV systems and platforms such as Microsoft Teams Rooms, Zoom Rooms, and/or Google Meet Rooms
* Technical skills within AV configuration, testing, troubleshooting, AV signal flow (audio, video, USB), and basic AV-related networking knowledge
* Experience with control systems such as Crestron, Extron, or Q-SYS is considered a plus
* AV certifications such as CTS or manufacturer training are meritorious


**What can you expect next?**
 To ensure a fair recruitment process free from unconscious bias, we handle your application anonymously and do not accept cover letters. Please refrain from sending one, so that the selection is based solely on professional competencies. We expect the following steps in the recruitment process:
   

  

* First interview with the Hiring Manager, Jerker.
* Second interview with other future colleagues.
* Possibly, a Cognitive and Personality Assessment Test via Assessio


***Please note that for this specific job, we don´t provide any relocation or work permit sponsorship support.***

title: Technical Sales Generalist
description:
**This job is with Epson Europe B.V, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly.**
**Your mission**
 As a Technical Sales Generalist for our Office Printing department, you will support our local sales teams, customers, and channel partners. In this role. You will translate customer needs into the right technical solutions within Epson’s product portfolio.
   

  

 The position is based out of our offices in Kista and will include regular business trips.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Build strong relationships with customers and channel partners, engaging early to understand their technical and business requirements.
* Translate customer needs into tailored product or system proposals aligned with our sales strategy.
* Support technical discussions and negotiations with customers and external service providers.
* Manage and support demo units, customer demonstrations, and local exhibitions/events.
* Provide first‑line troubleshooting and product guidance to customers and partners.
* Stay up to date on new products, software, and drivers and share this knowledge with the sales teams and partners.
* Deliver technical expertise at exhibitions, events, and customer presentations


**What We Ask For**
* Previous experience in technical sales or a similar role.
* Experience with 3rd party drivers/software and basic software & hardware testing
* Ideally technical product experience gained in a similar industry
* Troubleshooting, diagnostics, and event/exhibition technical support experience.
* Basic understanding of AV and printing technologies.
* Good knowledge of operating systems (including mobile).
* Structured approach to problem‑solving.
* Ability to communicate confidently at both technical and sales levels (verbal and written).
* Solid computer literacy: Windows, networking, MS Office.


 We are keen to hear from you even if you do not match all listed requirements, but you identify with our brand and passion for innovation.
   

  

**What We Offer**
**Our heritage**
 We aspire to be an indispensable company, trusted throughout the world for our commitment to openness, customer satisfaction and sustainability. We respect individuality while promoting teamwork, and we are committed to delivering unique value through innovative and creative solutions.
   

  

**Our commitment to the environment**
 We all have a role to play in building a better future. For Epson, being a sustainable company means being mindful of every aspect of our organisation – from the smallest lightbulb to the largest factory. It fuels our innovation, drives our growth, motivates our workforce and to contribute to society.
   

  

**Our people**
 We believe a healthy culture, strong values, teamwork, and contribution from a diverse range of individuals will help us to strive for excellence.
   

  

**Our brand**
 Ranked by Clarivate Analytics as a Top 100 Global Innovator brand for the last seven years running.
   

  

 Epson is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees. We actively encourage applications from individuals of all protected characteristics and are committed to providing any necessary accommodation during the application and assessment process, as well as upon joining our team.
   

  

 If you require additional assistance for your application or wheelchair access to our facilities, please email recruitment@epson.eu a member of our team will be happy to assist you.
