title: DevOps/Infra Engineer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
**What You’ll Be Doing**
 As a Senior DevOps/Infra Engineer at Coody, you’ll have the opportunity to work with some of the most inspiring digital entertainment companies in the world, in fields such as Gaming, AR/VR, Music, and other forms of interactive media. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams, including developers, designers, artists, producers, and product managers.
   

  

 You’ll need to be adaptable and ready to hit the ground running in new environments. We see every challenge as an opportunity to grow. Typically, you’ll work on 1-2 assignments per year for companies in industries that you’re passionate about.
   

  

****Who you are****
 We’re looking for talented engineers who loves to build immersive experiences and bring ideas to life. You thrive in fast-paced environments, enjoy pushing technical boundaries, and want the freedom to work on exciting projects - without the corporate nonsense.
   

  

* 5+ years of experience in software development or DevOps/Infrastructure engineering.
* Experience from modernization and migration of the entire CI/CD infrastructure
* Proven experience designing, building, and optimizing CI/CD pipelines for C#
* Strong skills using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform and Ansible
* A relevant degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Game Development, or similar
* Based in Sweden - You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, or permanent residency
* Be able to work from the clients office in central Stockholm about 3 days per week
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

****How to apply****
 Excited to take the next step in your career and work on meaningful client assignments? Apply now, and we’ll be in touch shortly.

title: Cloud Architect
description:
Key Responsibilities
 


* Design and implement secure and scalable GCP Landing Zones
* Develop and maintain cloud infrastructure, governance, IAM, and networking frameworks
* Automate cloud provisioning using Terraform/Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
* Ensure compliance, security, monitoring, and cost optimization across GCP environments
* Collaborate with DevOps, security, and application teams for cloud transformation initiatives
* Support migration and modernization projects on GCP



 Required Skills
 


* 10+ years of IT experience with strong GCP architecture expertise
* Hands-on experience with GCP Landing Zone implementation and maintenance
* Strong knowledge of IAM, VPC, Cloud Security, Networking, and Governance
* Experience with Terraform, CI/CD, Kubernetes, and cloud automation
* Knowledge of monitoring, logging, and cloud operations best practices
* GCP Certifications preferred

title: DevOps Engineer - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.**
**About Us**
 Tieto Caretech is modernizing the Nordic health and social care sector with modular, open, and interoperable software. We develop and deliver high quality software solutions and services that enable healthcare and welfare professionals to do their work even better and with higher efficiency - have more time to care.
   

  

 We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can build technology for the good of society and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people in need.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We work in an agile, multinational organization that develops cutting-edge products and services for both public and private sectors across the Nordic countries. Our teams are committed to creating, supporting, and delivering modern solutions used by healthcare and social care professionals throughout the region.
   

  

 We are now looking for DevOps Engineers for our Lifecare Open Platform and Clinical Core Solution Operations team to work on our OpenEHR products. Your daily work consists of delivering and deploying our solutions to our customers and providing support in case of needed.
   

  

**In this role you will**
* Participate in delivering and deploying our products to different customers
* Participate in supporting our customers in case needed


**We are looking for someone with**
* Strong understanding of containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with infrastructure automation and orchestration tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible, Helm)
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and version control systems (e.g., Git, Jenkins, GitLab, Azure DevOps)
* Proficiency in scripting and automation (e.g., Python, Bash, PowerShell)
* Familiarity with monitoring, logging, and alerting tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, OpenTelemetry)


**We expect you to have a**
* Strong understanding of customer needs and expectations
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve issues across infrastructure and application layers
* Ability to document and present complex solutions to stakeholders
* Capability to analyze complex systems with an end-to-end approach


**It would be beneficial if you also have**
* Proven experience working directly with customers
* SW development experience


**As a person you are**
* Eager to develop yourself and learn
* Good team player, attention to detail and you have ability to work well with others
* Able to support and consulting clients or internal teams


**What’s in it for you?**
 With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.
   

  

 Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.
   

  

**Could you be our new colleague?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Timo Heikkilä (timo.j.heikkila@tieto.com)
   

  

*We perform background checks on all final candidates.*
*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*
 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Release Manager – Enterprise Applications
description:
Release Manager – Enterprise Applications
 
**Location:** 
 Germany
   

**Industry:** 
 Pharmaceutical / Life Sciences
 


 Job Summary
 
 We are hiring a Release Manager to oversee software release planning, deployment coordination, and production readiness for enterprise applications in the pharmaceutical sector. The ideal candidate will ensure smooth release cycles while maintaining compliance, quality, and operational stability.
 


 Key Responsibilities
 * Plan, schedule, and manage application releases across environments
* Coordinate release activities between development, QA, operations, and business teams
* Maintain release calendars and deployment documentation
* Ensure release governance and change management compliance
* Monitor release quality and production deployment success
* Support rollback planning and incident management activities
* Drive automation and release process optimization initiatives
* Ensure compliance with pharmaceutical validation and regulatory standards


 Required Skills & Qualifications
 * Bachelor’s degree in IT, Engineering, or related discipline
* 5+ years of experience in Release Management or Deployment Management
* Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and release governance
* Pharmaceutical or life sciences industry experience is mandatory
* Knowledge of GxP, CSV, ITIL, and change management processes
* Experience with Azure DevOps, Jenkins, Jira, or similar tools
* ITIL certification is a plus
* Fluent English required; German language skills are an advantage

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Are you passionate about creating smooth, efficient development processes? Do you thrive in agile environments where collaboration, automation, and continuous improvement drive success? Would you like to be part of a team developing cutting-edge software that supports cancer care around the world? Then join us at RaySearch Laboratories as a DevOps Engineer and help shape the future of oncology information systems.
   

  

**About The Role**
 RaySearch is developing advanced software solutions to improve cancer treatment worldwide. As a DevOps Engineer at RaySearch, you’ll be part of a collaborative team driving automation, efficiency, and reliability across our development environments. You’ll work closely with developers and DevOps engineers across several products — including our oncology information system and treatment planning system — to optimize build pipelines, release processes, and development workflows. As our configuration teams grow, you’ll have great opportunities to shape routines and ways of working together. Your main tasks will be to:
   

  

* Strive to make the development iteration times short and efficient
* Manage build and release flows using pipelines
* Create and manage tools using the Azure DevOps API to input and output information
* Manage build and test servers and the related environments
* Administer, manage and provide support for Git version control


**Your profile**
**Required**
 We believe you are a collaborative and curious professional who enjoys working closely with others to make things run smoothly. You take initiative, share ideas, and look for ways to improve how things are done. We believe you are attentive to details and value quality in your work, while keeping a pragmatic mindset. You’re comfortable in a dynamic environment where teamwork and communication are key to success. Fluency in English is required, and Swedish proficiency is a plus. Further, we believe you have:
   

  

* A B.Sc. or M.Sc. in engineering or equivalent experience
* 5 years’ experience in software development and/or configuration managementExperience in programming using .NET (PowerShell/C#).
* Experience in continuous integration and deployment (using e.g. Azure DevOps pipelines, GitHub Actions, or similar).
* Experience in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Ansible).
* Experience in Windows Server administration/management.
* Excellent communication skills in English.


 Lastly, it is not a requirement but highly meritorious if you have experience in:
   

  

* Microsoft Visual Studio
* Git
* Automation and process management using Azure DevOps


**Our Culture**
 Culture at RaySearch is the driving force behind our organization
 **,** 
 where everything we do is driven by a shared passion for innovation and the fight against cancer. Our dedication is reflected in our ability to deliver exceptional results, pay close attention to detail, and consistently go the extra mile. Our employees stand out as experts in their field, driven by a relentless focus on solving problems - no matter how complex. At RaySearch, we take pride in leading the way in cancer treatment, leveraging cutting-edge technology to develop innovative solutions that make a real difference in patient care.
   

  

**Our Offer** 

 At RaySearch, we offer a diverse and inclusive work environment, fostering openness, sincerity, and collaboration. Located in Hagastaden, Stockholm's Life Science Hub, our modern and creative workspace includes an in-house gym, yoga, and social activities like ping pong, table football, and regular after-work events. Our bistro serves a fantastic lunch buffet, and we offer morning- and afternoon-fika every day. Our rooftop terrace also provides a stunning 360-degree view of Stockholm, enhancing the work experience. All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package.
   

  

**Application**
 Please apply for the position through the application form below. Selection and interviews will be ongoing. We do not accept applications by email.

title: Senior IAM Engineer
description:
We are looking for Senior IAM engineer to one of our client.
 



  





**Start date:** 
 15.06.2026
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm (3 days onsite, 2 days remote)
 



  





**Description** 




 The IAM Platform team is now looking for a new team member. We work closely together and share the passion for great technology and creating a smooth engineering experience. Our group consists of people with different expertise, experiences, age and background. We have an open and friendly approach towards each other. 
 



  





 About the role:
 



 At this position within Integrations & Connectivity, you will join a highly skilled IAM team responsible for designing, building, and operating Client’s Identity and Access Management platforms across both on-prem and cloud environments. The team works with modern IAM technologies, strong security practices, and deeply integrated solutions that are part of Client’s DevOps toolchains and digital platforms.
 



  





 As a Senior IAM Engineer, you will take an active role in evolving our IAM platforms by analyzing needs, designing architecture, and implementing robust technical solutions. IAM is a highly prioritized area at Client, which means close collaboration with development teams, security, cloud, and infrastructure units across the organization. You will also be a key contributor to Client’s cloud journey, ensuring that IAM capabilities support scalable, secure, and compliant cloud services.
 



  





**You will be responsible for:** 



* Designing and implementing IAM solutions and architectures
* Operating and evolving IAM platforms and infrastructure
* Supporting cloud and platform onboarding with secure IAM patterns
* Troubleshooting identity related issues and ensuring compliance with security policies
* Continuously improving the organization’s overall security posture in close collaboration with cross- functional teams



  





**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:** 



* 5 years or more experience within IAM engineering. Expert and hands on experience on access management tools
* Good knowledge of networking fundamentals (TLS, DNS, proxies, firewalls, VPNs)
* Advanced knowledge of certificate management and PKI, including handling SSL/TLS certificates
* Advanced knowledge with identity federation technology (ex. OpenID Connect, OAuth2).
* Experience on managing different IDP solutions (Identity providers)
* Good knowledge with Single Sign-On and Multi Factor Authentication solution (ex. FIDO2).
* Advanced knowledge with DevSecOps tools (e.g. managing platforms with Kubernetes, Docker, Git, Github actions).
* Advanced knowledge in programming languages, such as Java, Python, Go, Spring or Javascript.
* Good knowledge in Linux, Idap, Openshift and Infra-as-code (Terraform, Ansible and Helm)
* Experience working in hybrid and multi-cloud enterprise environments, including secure integration across multiple cloud providers and on-premises platforms.
* Hands-on experience with one or more enterprise identity platforms, such as Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD), Keycloak, or Curity.
* Experience operating within complex and highly integrated IT environments.
* Advanced troubleshooting capabilities and a deep understanding of IT infrastructure with the ability to diagnose and resolve complex identity and access issues across diverse systems and environments.



  





**Language:** 
 English & Swedish

title: Cloud Platform Engineer
description:
Ansök nu
   

  

* Urval sker löpande
* Stockholm
* Arbete på plats


 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Du har jobbat några år nu. Du är antagligen den i ditt nuvarande team som alltid tjatar om att "vi borde automatisera det där", men möts av gamla processer och färdiga mallar. Det är tryggt, men trångt.
   

  

 Men handen på hjärtat: Vill du bara följa kartan, eller vill du vara med och rita den?
   

  

 På Forefront satsar vi nu vidare. Vi bygger upp ett
 **helt nytt team** 
 inom GCP Infrastructure & Application Modernization. Vi söker dig som vill vara med från startskottet. Du kliver inte in i en "färdig maskin" – du får vara med och sätta standarden för hur vi jobbar, vilka verktyg vi väljer och vilken kultur vi skapar.
   

  

**Rollen: En nyckelspelare från dag ett**
 Som En Av De Första På Plats i Den Här Satsningen Blir Din Röst Viktig. Du Lämnar "Click-Ops" Bakom Dig Och Fokuserar På Hantverket
   

  

* Infrastructure as Code: Du bygger och underhåller miljöer med Terraform.
* Containerisering: Du hjälper till att flytta applikationer till GKE eller Cloud Run.
* Automatisering: Du sätter upp CI/CD-pipelines som gör att utvecklarna kan sova gott om natten.


 Kvalifikationer
   

  

**Din verktygslåda**
 Vi tror att du har cirka 3 års erfarenhet av moln och utveckling.
   

  

* Teknik: Du har bra koll på GCP (eller AWS/Azure och vill byta). Du behärskar scripting (Python/Bash) och grunderna i Kubernetes.
* Inställningen: Du lockas av tanken på att bygga något nytt. Du är en "doer" som hellre testar och lär dig än väntar på instruktioner.


**Vad får du? (WIIFM)** 
 Varför lämna tryggheten? För att få vara med på en resa där du inte bara är ett anställningsnummer. Hos oss får du en brant utvecklingskurva, budget för certifieringar och chansen att forma din egen roll i ett växande team.
   

  

**Kaffe före CV?** 
 Vi bryr oss mer om vart du är på väg än exakt vad du gjorde 2019. Känner du igen dig i Framåtrörelsen?
   

  

 Låt oss ta en kaffe och snacka om hur vi bygger framtidens team. Ansök nu eller hör av dig direkt!

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**Vill du vara med och bygga en modern, container- och tooling-plattform som Sveriges betalflöden är beroende av – varje dag, i alla lägen?**
 På Bankgirot har vi gjort ett aktivt val: att ta ansvar för något större än oss själva. Sedan 1959 har vi stått för den tekniska strukturen som binder samman Sveriges banker och ser till att betalningar fungerar tryggt och stabilt. Samtidigt befinner vi oss i en av de största teknikförflyttningarna i modern tid.
   

  

 Nu etablerar vi en ny, växande platform engineering-förmåga och söker två Platform Engineers, en medior och en senior, som vill vara med och forma framtiden.
   

  

**Hos oss får du**
* Vara med och bygga en modern, open source-baserad plattform som är avgörande för Sveriges betalflöden
* Arbeta i gränslandet mellan infrastruktur, utveckling, säkerhet med cloud native-teknik
* Påverka arbetssätt, teknikval och arkitektur i en plattform ständigt under uppbyggnad
* Vara en del av en samhällsviktig verksamhet med höga krav på tillgänglighet, stabilitet och säkerhet


**Om rollen**
 Som Platform Engineer blir du en del av vårt nystartade team
 **Cloud, Container, Platform & Tooling** 
 . Du kliver in i en produktionssatt plattform som snabbt har gått från idé till verklighet, och som nu utvecklas vidare mot en mer mogen, robust och lättanvänd lösning där vi själva äger, driftar och vidareutvecklar komponenterna.
   

  

 Du kommer att få arbeta i en modern teknikmiljö som inkluderar bland annat en containerplattform baserat på vanilla kubernetes omgiven av en service mesh, samt tooling bestående av GitLab, ArgoCD och Jfrog Artifactory & Xray.
   

  

**I rollen ingår att**
* Designa, drifta och vidareutveckla containerplattformen, både on‑prem och i cloud
* Automatisera plattforms- och driftprocesser samt vidareutveckla CI/CD- och GitOps‑flöden
* Arbeta med verktyg som GitLab, ArgoCD och Ansible
* Samarbeta med användare kring onboarding, stöd och kontinuerlig förbättring av plattformen
* Samarbeta med säkerhets- och driftorganisationen för att säkerställa krav på tillgänglighet, prestanda och säkerhet
* Arbeta proaktivt med robusthet, observability, säkerhet och incidenthantering


**Vi vill att du**
 Är T-formad med solid grund inom Linux och har vidareutvecklat din kompetens inom någon del av den moderna cloud native-världen. Oavsett om din spets ligger inom Kubernetes, CI/CD tooling, automation, observability eller säkerhet har du en naturlig nyfikenhet och vilja att fortsätta utvecklas.
   

  

  

* Har erfarenhet av containerteknik och CI/CD tooling i produktionsmiljö, on-prem eller cloud
* Vill ersätta varje manuellt flöde med automation
* Trivs i en dynamisk miljö under uppbyggnad och vill aktivt bidra till arkitektur, teknikval och plattformsutveckling, med ett pragmatiskt förhållningssätt och stark samarbetsförmåga


**Så arbetar vi tillsammans**
 Hos oss arbetar vi gärna tillsammans på kontoret – det stärker samarbete, lärande och vår gemensamma kultur. Här finns goda möjligheter att utvecklas i yrkesrollen och ta nästa steg över tid. Vi erbjuder också förmåner som gör skillnad i vardagen, som eget gym, generöst friskvårdsbidrag, cykelförmån samt trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar.
   

  

**Säkerhetsprövning**
 För rollen genomförs säkerhetsprövning innan anställning i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) – en naturlig del av ansvaret att värna tryggheten i Sveriges betalsystem.
   

  

**Anställningsform**
 Tillsvidare
   

  

**Tillträde**
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Vill du vara med och skapa framdrift? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig. Urval sker löpande.
   

  

 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar vi med Nexer Recruit. Har du frågor eller funderingar? Kontakta gärna rekryteringskonsult Johanna Värmfors:
 **johanna.varmfors@nexergroup.com** 
 eller +46 730 821 230 alternativt Jenny Nilsson:
 **jenny.nilsson@nexergroup.com** 
 eller +46 703 018 279.
   

  

**Om Bankgirot**
 Sedan starten 1959 har Bankgirot stått för den tekniska strukturen som binder samman Sveriges banker i det nationella betalsystemet. Företagets historia präglas av innovation, engagemang och stolthet över sitt samhällsviktiga uppdrag. Genom expertkunskap och en stark kultur arbetar man varje dag för att säkerställa att varje transaktion sker sömlöst och effektivt.
   

  

 Tillsammans med kunder och samarbetspartners skapas långsiktigt värde för marknaden och samhället. Som en förenande kraft formar Bankgirot en modern och framtidssäkrad svensk betalinfrastruktur. Bankgirot förenar, förvaltar och förnyar betalsverige. Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se
   

  

 Bankgirot är ett svenskt clearinghus och teknikbolag med över 60 års erfarenhet av att leverera finansiell infrastruktur till banker. I samverkan med betalsektorn ser vi till att privatpersoner och företag enkelt kan göra överföringar och betalningar. Bankgirot säkerställer att det nuvarande betalsystemet fungerar felfritt, samtidigt som vi utvecklar framtidssäkrade lösningar. Vi säkrar och utvecklar Sveriges betalningar.
   

  

 Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se

title: Senior Backend Platform Engineer
description:
About Us
 
  





 We build software that makes governance, risk, and compliance approachable: turning dense regulatory frameworks and internal policy into something organizations can work with. AI is central to how we do that, surfacing the right information, making sense of complex documents, and keeping outputs trustworthy in a domain where accuracy matters.
 



  





 We were founded by Magnus Juvas, serial entrepreneur behind Solidify and Transcendent Group, and Emelie Alftrén, with over two decades in risk management and governance. Two people who had seen the problem from both sides and decided to solve it properly.
 



  





 We're early-stage, meaning the foundations are in place but there's plenty left to shape. You'll have real ownership over both what you build and how it evolves. We're based in Stockholm and work hybrid.
 



  





 Joining Nooga means three things.
 



  





**Own it:** 
 we take responsibility and act. If you see a problem, you step up.
 



**Challenge the norm:** 
 we don't build things the way they've always been built. We build them better.
 



**Succeed together:** 
 with each other, and with our customers.
 



  




 Role Overview
 
  





 You'll own the platform that everything else runs on: infrastructure, automation, Kubernetes, and Azure, defined in Terraform, operated with discipline, and evolved with intention. You treat the platform as a product: clean developer experience, reliable operations, and security that's built in rather than bolted on.
 



  





 You'll start with a clear focus on Navigator (our core product) and grow from there as the company scales. You'll own both the operational and security dimensions of the platform, and you'll be the person who makes sure we're running things correctly, not just running them. You're comfortable enough in application code to collaborate closely with the backend team, but the platform is where you want to be.
 



  




 What You'll Work On
 
  




* Terraform modules that define, provision, and evolve tenant infrastructure on AKS
* Deployment pipelines and the workflows that ship and manage services across tenants
* AKS cluster operations: node pools, autoscaling, ingress (Front Door + WAF), and day-to-day reliability
* Security and identity: Workload Identity, Key Vault integration, zero-credential service auth, and least-privilege across the platform
* Networking: VNets, subnets, private endpoints, private DNS, TLS
* Docker base-image strategy, CI build pipelines, and image hygiene
* Observability: log routing, health checks, alerting, and metrics, built to be useful during incidents, not just present
* Evolving the platform beyond Navigator as the company grows: automation, standardisation, and broader infrastructure ownership



  




 What We're Looking For
 
  




* 5+ years of platform, SRE, or infrastructure work running production Kubernetes (AKS, EKS, GKE, or on-prem)
* Strong Terraform: modules, remote state, drift management, and a track record of teams actually using the IaC you write
* Solid cloud operations experience: comfortable managing infrastructure in a cloud environment, with attention to cost, security, and scale. We run on Azure; experience on AWS or GCP transfers well
* Solid networking fundamentals: VNets/VPCs, private endpoints, DNS, ingress, TLS
* Container fundamentals: multi-stage Dockerfiles, base-image strategy, build discipline, image security
* Security mindset woven into platform work, not a separate concern
* Helm and/or Kustomize; comfortable with raw manifests when needed
* Opinionated about platform quality, but grounded in what the teams using the platform actually need
* Comfortable reading and debugging Python/Celery application code, enough to collaborate effectively and unblock yourself



  




 Helpful But Not Required
 
  




* Azure specifically (AKS, Front Door, Workload Identity, Private DNS, AI Foundry)
* Multi-tenant SaaS platform experience
* PostgreSQL extensions (pgvector, AGE) or self-hosted Milvus at production scale
* GitOps tooling (Argo CD, Flux, GitHub Actions, etc.): we use deploy scripts today and welcome a view on whether to change that



  




 What We Offer
 
  




* Competitive salary and benefits.
* Office in central Stockholm with a flexible hybrid environment.
* Career growth and development opportunities.



  




 How to Apply
 
  





 Send your resume and preferably a short cover letter detailing your relevant experience and what excites you about this role to careers@nooga.net.

title: Verifieringsingenjör
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
**Din roll**
 Vi söker nu en verifieringsingenjör till ett team i Stockholm som arbetar nära utvecklingen av Gripen. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta med avancerade tekniska system i en miljö där samarbete, kunskapsdelning och långsiktig utveckling står i fokus.
   

  

 Teamet arbetar genom hela projektkedjan och ansvarar för att kravställning, verifiering och systemarbete håller hög kvalitet.
   

  

 I rollen arbetar du med verifiering i tekniskt avancerade utvecklingsprojekt där du analyserar krav, tar fram testunderlag och säkerställer att system uppfyller ställda krav och fungerar enligt förväntan. Du är delaktig genom hela utvecklingskedjan och arbetar nära systemingenjörer och andra tekniska funktioner.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Arbeta med kravanalys och verifiering av system
* Ta fram verifieringsspecifikationer och testunderlag
* Säkerställa att system uppfyller krav och fungerar enligt förväntan
* Delta i verifieringsarbete genom hela utvecklingskedjan
* Bidra till utveckling av arbetssätt och kunskapsdelning i teamet


 Rollen passar dig som vill arbeta nära tekniken i en avancerad utvecklingsmiljö och samtidigt bidra till utvecklingen av framtidens försvarsteknik.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av verifiering, test eller systemarbete
* Förståelse för systemdesign och tekniska krav
* Ett strukturerat och noggrant arbetssätt med god analytisk förmåga
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
**Vad du blir en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
   

  

 Om du är intresserad av vilka förmåner som du kan ta del av som anställd på Saab i Sverige, kan du läsa om dem här

title: Forskningsingenjör inom robotsystem för luft- och undervattensdomäner
description:
Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 I den här tjänsten kommer du att arbeta med utveckling, integration och testning av autonoma robotsystem med tyngdpunkt på mjukvara, inbyggda system och praktisk fältverksamhet. Arbetet omfattar programmering i Python och C++, utveckling i ROS2, integration mot embedded hardware samt verifiering i både simulator och verkliga miljöer.
   

  

 Tjänsten är kopplad till projektet
 **I-SEE – Integrerad autonomi i luft-, yt- och undervattensdomäner för extrema miljöer** 
 , som syftar till att minska väderberoende, kostnader och säkerhetsrisker i marina AUV-operationer genom tillämpad AI för autonom sjösättning och återhämtning. Arbetet omfattar utveckling av multi-domänsystem där obemannade flyg- och undervattensfarkoster samverkar, med fokus på edge-baserad perception, distribuerat beslutsfattande, operatörsstöd och robust funktion i realistiska och krävande miljöer.
   

  

 Tjänsten innefattar även deltagande i experiment, provning och demonstrationer av robotsystem i både labb- och fältmiljö. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med forskare, ingenjörer och externa partners i en dynamisk utvecklingsmiljö där prototypframtagning, testning och iterativ utveckling är centrala delar.
   

  

 Vad som ingår i en forskaranställning kan du läsa mer om i Anställningsordningen.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

**Krav**
* MSc examen inom relevant område.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Python och/eller C++.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av ROS2.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med embedded hardware/inbyggda system.
* God förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på engelska då det behövs i det dagliga arbetet.
* Möjlighet att resa i tjänsten inom Sverige och Europa.
* Simkunnighet.
* Teknisk skicklighet
* Förmåga att utveckla, integrera och testa avancerade robotsystem
* Förmåga att arbeta praktiskt och strukturerat i experimentella miljöer
* Förmåga att samarbeta i tvärdisciplinära team


 Som person är du självgående, lösningsorienterad och noggrann. Du trivs med att arbeta både praktiskt och analytiskt, och kan växla mellan utveckling i kod, integration av hårdvara och testning i fält. Du har god samarbetsförmåga och bidrar till en positiv och professionell arbetsmiljö.
   

  

**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av utveckling eller testning av drönare.
* Erfarenhet att hantera fordon, båtar i praktisk fältverksamhet i relevanta miljöer (ink. relevanta behörigheter för dessa)
* Erfarenhet av CAD.
* Erfarenhet av 3D-printing och prototypframtagning.
* Erfarenhet av Unity.
* Medvetenhet om mångfalds- och likabehandlingsfrågor med särskild fokus på jämställdhet.


 Vi kommer lägga stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Bli en del av KTH
   

  

 KTH formar framtiden genom utbildning, forskning och innovation. Som ett ledande internationellt tekniskt universitet spelar vi en aktiv roll i att driva och medverka i omställningen till ett hållbart samhälle. Här erbjuds du möjligheten att växa och utvecklas på en kreativ och dynamisk arbetsplats med goda arbetsvillkor och förmåner. Jämställdhet, mångfald och lika villkor är en kvalitetsfråga och en självklar del av KTH:s värdegrund som universitet och statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Läs mer om våra förmåner och hur det är att arbeta och utvecklas på KTH.
   

  

 Fackliga representanter
   

  

 Kontaktuppgifter till fackliga representanter.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Du ansöker via KTH:s rekryteringssystem. Du som sökande har huvudansvaret för att din ansökan är komplett när den skickas in.
   

  

**Ansökan Bör Innehålla**
* CV inklusive relevant yrkeserfarenhet och kunskap.
* Kopia av examensbevis och betyg från dina tidigare universitetsstudier. Översättningar till engelska eller svenska om de ursprungliga dokumenten inte utfärdas på något av dessa språk.
* Kortfattad redogörelse för varför du vill bedriva forskning, dina akademiska intressen och hur de relaterar till dina tidigare studier och framtida mål. max 2 sidor lång.


 Ansökan ska vara KTH tillhanda senast sista ansökningsdagen vid midnatt, CET/CEST (CentralEuropean Time/Central European Summer Time).
   

  

 Om anställningen
   

  

 Anställningen gäller tidsbegränsat enligt avtal - i upp till 12 mån, med tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Övrigt
   

  

 För information om behandling av personuppgifter i samband med rekrytering.
   

  

 Det kan förekomma att en anställning hos KTH är placerad i säkerhetsklass. Om så är fallet för just denna anställning görs en säkerhetsprövning av sökande i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) efter samtycke. I dessa fall är en förutsättning för anställning att sökande blir godkänd efter säkerhetsprövning.
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt försäljare av platsannonser.

title: Senior ServiceNow-utvecklare
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Om oss:**
 Sopra Steria är Europas ledande konsultföretag inom ServiceNow och digital transformation. Vi hjälper företag och organisationer att effektivisera sina verksamheter genom innovativa teknologilösningar. Med fler än 4000 ServiceNow-experter besitter vi marknadens största och mest framstående ServiceNow-team där du får möjligheten att arbeta med de mest spännande projekten samt utvecklas i en dynamisk och framåtlutad arbetsmiljö. Nu tar vi nästa stora kliv och satsar ännu hårdare på vår ledande position inom ServiceNow. Hos oss får du chansen att vara med och driva utvecklingen framåt, forma framtidens lösningar och göra verklig skillnad. Vill du vara en del av vårt ledande team?
   

  

**Om rollen:**
 I rollen som Senior Utvecklare inom ServiceNow kommer du att vara en nyckelspelare i att utveckla och implementera lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen för våra kunder. Du säkerställer att tekniska lösningar håller hög kvalitet, är hållbara och anpassade efter kundens verksamhet. Som Elite Partner för ServiceNow har vi en av Skandinaviens största och mest kvalificerade konsultgrupper med närmare 500 dedikerade experter. Vi söker nu en erfaren Senior Utvecklare som kan ta en strategisk och operativ roll i våra teamleveranser.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga uppgifter:**
* Utveckla och konfigurera lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen.
* Säkerställa teknisk kvalitet och bästa praxis i lösningarna.
* Fungera som rådgivare till kunder kring tekniska lösningar och plattformsutveckling.
* Leda tekniska workshops och kravinsamling med kunder.
* Samarbeta med processledare och andra roller för att säkerställa helhetslösningar.
* Analysera och optimera befintliga lösningar samt identifiera förbättringsområden.


**För att vara framgångsrik i rollen tror vi att du har:**
* Flerårig erfarenhet av utveckling och implementation inom ServiceNow.
* Gedigen kunskap i JavaScript samt god förståelse för webbteknologier som HTML och CSS.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med moduler som ITSM, ITOM, HR eller SecOps.
* Förmåga att leda tekniska dialoger och workshops med kund.
* Relevant akademisk utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande.
* Flytande svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* En spännande arbetsmiljö hos Europas ledande ServiceNow-konsultbolag.
* Möjlighet att arbeta med innovativa lösningar och den senaste tekniken.
* Kompetensutveckling genom certifieringar, utbildningar och mentorskap.
* Hybrid arbetsmodell samt konkurrenskraftiga villkor och förmåner.


**Om ServiceNow-teamet på Sopra Steria:**
 Sopra Steria är Nordens ledande expert inom ServiceNow – vi har den största och mest specialiserade kompetensen på marknaden. Vårt starka och sammansvetsade team levererar omfattande och högkvalitativa lösningar, där flera av våra erfarna ServiceNow-konsulter samarbetar för att maximera värdet för våra kunder. Vi drivs av innovation, samarbete och kunskapsutbyte – tillsammans sätter vi nya standarder och skapar framtidens digitala lösningar. Vill du arbeta med de bästa? Då är Sopra Steria platsen för dig.
   

  

**Om Sopra Steria:**
 Sopra Steria är en av Europas ledande aktörer inom digital transformation, med över 60 000 medarbetare i mer än 30 länder globalt. Vi driver innovation och hjälper företag och organisationer att effektivisera, utvecklas och skapa långsiktigt värde genom banbrytande teknologilösningar.
   

  

 Hos oss arbetar de främsta experterna inom sina områden i en dynamisk och framtidsorienterad miljö där samarbete, nytänkande och teknisk spetskompetens står i centrum.
   

  

**Vill du veta mer om oss? Läs här: Om oss | Sopra Steria**
**Ansökan:**
 Om du är redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär och vara en del av en framstående arbetsplats, ansök genom att ladda upp ditt CV. Kontakta gärna ansvarig rekryterare, Teodor Nellvik (teodor.nellvik@soprasteria.com) eller Business Owner Mikael Kroglund (mikael.kroglund@soprasteria.com) för eventuella frågor om tjänsten.
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

**Välkommen till Sopra Steria – där din kompetens formar framtidens digitala lösningar!**
**Ytterligare information**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande internationellt konsultbolag inom digital transformation. Vi bygger samhället genom designdriven innovation, teknisk utveckling med kunskap om marknadens ledande plattformar och driftlösningar (managed services). Med modern teknologi och en gedigen affärsförståelse är vi en helhetspartner för våra kunder och deras digitala transformationsresa. Enligt Great Place To Work är vi en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser, vi har tilldelats utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad och Gartner har listat oss som ett topp 5 bolag inom digital transformation.

title: Golang utvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* 4–5+ års erfarenhet av backendutveckling
* Minst 1–2 års erfarenhet av Golang
* Erfarenhet från regulatoriska miljöer där dokumentation och kvalitet varit centralt, exempelvis MedTech, HealthTech, Finance eller liknande
* Förståelse för DevOps/infra är meriterande, men inget huvudfokus


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 28-05-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.

title: Solution Sales Expert, Sweden
description:
**We help the world run better**  

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.### **PURPOSE AND OBJECTIVES:**


The software market in the Nordics & Baltics is characterized by a very dynamic and highly innovative landscape. The growth of enterprise applications in the region is strong, with digital transformation continuing to drive changes in existing business models. Digitalization, Sustainability, and Artificial Intelligence are fueling rapid adoption of end‑to‑end integrated Procurement and Finance solutions—especially those supporting a digital thread across Financial Close, Tax Management, GRC, Sourcing, Category Management, Direct Procurement, and Quote‑to‑Cash.


Given this acceleration, the Finance & Spend (F&S) business area is crucial for our customers, SAP, and society at large. Our team specializes in selling cloud‑based solutions that optimize Finance & Spend operations in the Nordic and Baltic region. With a strong customer focus and a mission to help companies run at their best, we continue to grow. We are now seeking a new **F&S Solution Sales Executive** to join our team in Sweden.

### **EXPECTATIONS AND TASKS:**

* S**trong business acumen for complex enterprise organizations to identify strategic value drivers and elevate solution positioning. 8+ years of experience**
* **Engage and consult with senior stakeholders—including CXO level—on digital transformation strategies across Finance and Procurement**
* **Leverage deep understanding and proven track record within strategic Finance & Procurement processes to shape customer roadmaps and influence long‑term decision‑making**

* Achievement of agreed (incremental) revenue & pipeline targets
* Forecasting and regular pipeline status reporting
* Full opportunity and bid management for F&S deals
* Account planning, deal acceleration and structured closing plans
* Proactive collaboration with local Industry Sales teams
* Negotiation of complex commercial and contractual structures
* Engagement with key business areas within customer organizations (development, planning, manufacturing, sales & distribution, aftersales/services)
* Promote a value‑based solution approach in collaboration with industry and product specialists
* Develop and execute local go‑to‑market strategies
* Drive demand‑generation with regional and local marketing/business development
* Build, manage and enable a strong partner ecosystem
* Share best practices across the region and market units

**EDUCATION AND QUALIFICATIONS / SKILLS AND COMPETENCIES:****Required skills:**  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Management, Information Systems, Procurement, or a related field
* Strong sales attitude—from pipeline creation to closing
* Solid understanding of core supply chain and logistics processes
* Excellent communication and presentation skills at executive level
* Strong networking capabilities across customer buying centers
* Excellent organizational, strategy planning and program management skills
* Fluency in English and Swedish
* **Demonstrated business acumen for large, complex and multinational enterprise environments**
* **Experience translating customer strategy into digital transformation initiatives within Finance and Procurement**
* **Confidence and presence in strategic dialogues with senior leadership, including C‑level executives**
### **WORK EXPERIENCE:**

* Strong background and track record in Professionel consulting, Account Management, Industry Sales, Solution Sales, and/or Project Sales
* 10+ years of experience in a similar sales/professional consulting role
* Experience developing and executing business plans and strategic programs
* Cross‑industry process understanding is highly beneficial
* **Proven experience working with complex Finance & Procurement processes (e.g., Source‑to‑Pay, Order‑to‑Cash, Record‑to‑Report, Tax, GRC, Direct Procurement)**
* **Experience advising or consulting executives (CFO, CPO, COO) on digital transformation strategies or operating model changes**
* **Experience navigating complex enterprise structures, governance models, and multi‑stakeholder decision environments**

 **Bring out your best**  

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
  

  

**We win with inclusion**  

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.  

  

SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.  

  

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.  

  

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.  

  

Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor. **AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.  

  

Requisition ID: 447301 | Work Area: Sales | Expected Travel: 0 - 10% | Career Status: Professional | Employment Type: Regular Full Time | Additional Locations: #LI-Hybrid
company_description: SAP's purpose is to help the world run better and improve people's lives with sustainability at the core.

title: Solution Consultant - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Malmö, Sweden


* Full-time
* Consulting
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description  

At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide citizens and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.  



**About us**


We are a team of technical consultants working on assignments for our customers across Sweden and Norway, assisting with installations and various technical solutions. Our customers are primarily municipalities. Our team is distributed nationwide. We are now looking for a new colleague to join us in the role of Technical Consultant.  



**About the role**


In this role, you will provide IT systems strategy, development, and integration services to external clients. You will work closely with client organizations to assess their software, hardware, and network requirements, and advise on technology solutions that align with their business strategy and operational processes.


You will lead and contribute to a range of technology consulting projects, including Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), technology strategy and transformation, information systems security, data strategy, and systems architecture. The role also involves supporting custom systems development, new system implementations, application migrations, enterprise application integration (EAI), as well as web, IP, and networking solutions.


This is a client-facing role where your ability to translate business needs into effective technology solutions will be key to delivering successful outcomes.

 **Your main responsibilities will include:**

* Install, configure, and maintain our operational environments for customers across Sweden and Norway
* Support municipalities with technical areas such as SQL Server, IIS, Azure, SAML|OIDC configuration, APIs, firewalls, and PKI certificate management
* Act as a technical expert in customer implementation projects, working closely with our development teams and business consultants
* Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues to ensure stable and secure system operation.
* Continuously build knowledge of our products and solutions as part of your onboarding and ongoing professional development
* Participate in an on-call rotation to ensure availability and support for critical systems outside regular working hours

 **We are looking for someone who has:**

* At least **5 years of relevant experience** in the field
* Strong experience with **Windows Server** and **Microsoft SQL Server**
* Hands-on experience with **Azure** and **IIS**
* Solid understanding of **networking and firewall configurations**
* Experience working with **APIs and system integrations**
* **Fluency in Swedish and English**, both written and spoken

  

As a person, you are an engaged and open team player who enjoys working with diverse cultures, driving projects forward, and ensuring high-quality deliveries. You are self-motivated, solution-oriented, and thrive in a role that combines both independent work and collaboration with colleagues and customers. You have a solid technical foundation and preferably experience within the sectors of Social Care or hands-on experience with systems such as Procapita/Lifecare/Socio/Gerica.  



**What’s in it for you?**

With us, you will be part of a dedicated team that provides internal and external support within our organization. You are outgoing, enjoy helping customers, and see each customer issue as a challenge that helps you grow. You will work with new technology and collaborate closely with experienced colleagues, giving you strong opportunities to develop in your role.  



**Could you be our new colleague?**

We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring managers fredrik.stadling@tieto.com

  

*We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
company_description: At the heart of Tieto are our people – collaborators, creators, and problem-solvers who bring innovations to life. Join us !

title: Tech Lead
description:
*Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realise amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.*


Common Tech is the engine behind Saab’s technological transformation—building the shared platforms, capabilities, and foundations that enable the entire organization to scale, innovate, and deliver at speed.


Within this ecosystem, Product Tech plays a unique role—bridging the gap between technology and real-world impact. It ensures that the capabilities built in Common Tech are not just available—but adopted, integrated, and used where it matters most: in real products, by real teams. A particular focus lies on AI-based solutions that will be integrated into Saab's product portfolio and used broadly across the organization. What you help create in Product Tech has direct impact across multiple products, teams and business areas. Product Tech is where Saab’s future technology is shaped—and where it is brought into real use across the whole organization.


Your role


We are now looking for a Tech Lead to join Product Tech at Saab. You will play a key role in both strategic important digitalization initiatives and Forward Deployed engagements, helping accelerate innovation and enable real impact across the organization.


This role sits at the heart of Saab’s digital strategy execution model, where different types of engagements come together:

* Strategic, business-critical initiatives focused on developing new solutions and pushing the boundaries of current capabilities
* High-impact efforts where you enable teams adopt and implement modern technologies, platforms, and ways of working in real product environments


As a Tech Lead you will operate across both—building new capabilities while also ensuring they are successfully deployed, adopted, and used in practice. You combine hands-on development, technical leadership and delivery responsibility.


What you will do:


Hands-on engineering:

* Design, build, and integrate solutions within cloud, data, and AI
* Work with modular architecture, design and reusable building blocks and common components - It’s about building robust, reusable, and future-proof solutions that others can rely on.
* Contribute to both new development and real-world implementation (Forward Deployment)


Drive delivery:

* Take end-to-end ownership of team deliveries
* Remove obstacles and accelerate progress
* Manage risks, dependencies, and escalations
* Ensure value is delivered in complex environments


Provide technical direction:

* Set and guide the technical direction of the team
* Ensure alignment with modern principles (modular, cloud-first, AI-enabled)
* Balance rapid delivery with long-term architectural integrity


Enable adoption and transformation:

* Work directly with Business Unit teams to deploy and operationalize solutions in real environments
* Support onboarding, workshops, and hands-on collaboration (e.g., pair/mob programming)
* Ensure knowledge transfer—so teams can own, use, and scale solutions independently

  

Your profile


We believe you thrive in environments where:

* You alternate between building new solutions and enabling others to use them
* Requirements evolve, and impact matters more than perfection
* You work close to real users and real products


You bring:

* Strong software engineering experience (cloud, CI/CD, modular architecture; experience in data/AI)
* Proven ability to lead technically while staying hands-on
* Experience working in complex systems or product environments
* A solution-oriented mindset and ability to navigate ambiguity
* Enable teams to move forward when things are unclear or challenging
* Strong communication skills and a collaborative, coaching approach
* The ability to bring structure, clarity, and direction where none exists, especially in complex and fast-moving environments


Experience:

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent work experience
* Several years of experience in software engineering/development, preferably within complex systems or product environments
* Proven experience working with cloud-based solutions, CI/CD pipelines, and modern software development practices, system design and architecture, preferably in modular or distributed systems
* Experience and/or understanding of how AI and data can be applied to create real-world value in products, beyond experimentation or prototyping


Technical competence:

* Strong capability to design, build, and integrate solutions within cloud, data, and/or AI domains
* Experience working with modular architecture and reusable building blocks
* Ability to develop robust, scalable, and reusable solutions that can be leveraged across teams and products
* Understanding of how to design future-proof systems that support long-term evolution and reuse

*This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.*


What you will be part of


Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.


Saab is a leading defense and security company with an enduring purpose, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.


Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defense capability of several nations. Read more about us here
company_description: Saab serves the global market with world-leading products, services and solutions from military defense to civil security.

title: Senior Operational Technology (OT) Architect – Technical Authority
description:
**Company Description**  

Vattenfall is a European energy company with approximately 21000 employees. For more than 100 years we have electrified industries, supplied energy to people’s homes and modernized our way of living through innovation and cooperation. We now want to make fossil-free living possible within one generation. To be able to reach this ambitious goal we are looking for talented individuals who, in addition to their passion for their own role, also have strong team spirit and want to contribute to supporting a meaningful corporate mission.

 **Job Description**  

We are seeking a Senior Operational Technology (OT) Architect – Technical Authority to define, govern, and evolve the OT architecture across our renewable energy portfolio.  

A Technical Authority is expected to:

* Own architecture and standards across the domain
* Act as escalation point for complex system decisions
* Drive roadmap alignment and governance
* Ensure competence development and consistency across teams


This is not only a design role. You will act as a technical authority for SCADA and OT systems, setting standards, guiding engineering teams, and ensuring consistent, high-quality solutions across projects and assets.


You will play a central role in building and developing technical competencies within Operational Technology in BA Wind, ensuring that our solutions are robust, secure, and scalable while enabling operational excellence.

**Your Responsibilities**


As a Senior OT Architect / Technical Authority, you will:


Architecture & Governance

* Define, maintain, and enforce the OT architecture strategy for SCADA and automation systems
* Establish and govern reference architectures, standards, and design principles across all assets
* Act as the technical escalation point for complex system and integration decisions
* Ensure alignment of architectures across projects, assets, and business units


Technical Authority & Capability Building

* Act as Technical Authority for SCADA and OT systems, ensuring consistency and quality of engineering deliverables
* Guide, coach, and challenge engineering teams to improve technical solutions and design decisions
* Drive competence development within OT engineering teams (methods, tools, best practices)
* Translate complex technical topics into clear guidance for both engineers and stakeholders


Engineering & Delivery Support

* Lead the design and integration of Level 1 SCADA systems from major OEMs (Siemens, Vestas, GE, Nordex)
* Support project teams with solution design, trade-offs, and technical decision-making
* Drive standardization and interoperability across multi-vendor SCADA platforms
* Provide technical leadership in vendor selection, system upgrades, and lifecycle management


Technology Leadership

* Own and maintain the OT technology and architecture roadmap
* Ensure cybersecurity-by-design and compliance with regulatory standards
* Support digitalisation initiatives, including OT/IT integration and data enablement
* Identify and drive adoption of emerging technologies and automation trends

  

**Qualifications** **Experience & Expertise**

* Have extensive experience in OT architecture within renewable energy, with deep SCADA expertise
* Bring proven experience acting as a senior technical lead, architect, or authority across multiple systems or projects
* Have strong hands-on knowledge of Level 1 SCADA systems (Siemens, Vestas, GE, Nordex)
* Understand industrial communication protocols (IEC 61850, OPC UA, Modbus) and OT cybersecurity


Leadership & Impact

* Demonstrate the ability to guide, influence, and challenge engineering teams without direct line authority
* Are able to translate complex technical concepts into clear and actionable guidance
* Have experience driving standardisation, governance, and cross-team alignment


Architecture & Systems Thinking

* Strong knowledge of architecture frameworks (ISA‑95, IEC 62443)
* Proven track record of designing scalable, secure, and resilient OT solutions
* Experience working across multiple projects, ensuring consistency and reuse


Nice to Have

* Experience integrating OT with cloud and data platforms
* Knowledge of asset management systems and digital twin approaches
* Experience working in a Technical Authority / domain lead setup

  

**Additional Information** **Our offer**  

Good remuneration, a challenging and international work environment, and the possibility to work with some of the best in the field. You will be working in interdisciplinary teams and you can always count on support from committed colleagues. We offer attractive employment conditions and opportunities for personal and professional development.  

  

**More Information**  

We welcome your application in English, no later than 14/06/2026. We kindly request that you do not send applications by any means other than via our website as we cannot guarantee that we will be able to process applications that are not made via our website.  

  

For more information about the recruitment process you are welcome to contact our recruiter Adam Hammond via adam.hammond@vattenfall.com

**Commitment to Diversity**


Vattenfall is committed to promoting a diverse and inclusive community - a place where we can all be ourselves and succeed on merit. We offer a range of family friendly, inclusive employment policies, flexible working arrangements, staff engagement forums and services to support all our employees.


We are convinced that diversity contributes to build a more profitable and attractive company and we strive to be good role model regarding diversity. Vattenfall works actively for all employees to have the same opportunities and rights regardless of gender, ethnicity, age, transgender identity or expression, religion or other belief, disability or sexual orientation.  

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**

title: Consultant
description:
**Job Title:** Consultant/Senior Consultant – Data Scientist
  
**Location:** Sweden
  
**Experience:** Minimum 6 years
  
**Technologies:** Machine Learning, MLOps, Python, Neural Networks, NLP, Computer Vision, Model Deployment, Kubernetes, Data Analysis, Generative AI
  
  

Role Overview
  
A highly skilled Technology Lead – Data Scientist with strong experience in designing, developing, and deploying advanced data science and machine learning solutions at scale. The role involves leading end-to-end AI/ML initiatives, establishing robust MLOps practices, and delivering production‑ready models that drive business outcomes.
  
The ideal candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, architects, and cross‑functional teams to deliver high‑impact analytics, machine learning, and AI solutions, while providing technical leadership and mentoring within the data science team.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
Machine Learning & Data Science
  
Design, develop, and optimize machine learning models for predictive modeling, classification, and forecasting use cases
  
Apply data analysis and data wrangling techniques to prepare high‑quality datasets from diverse data sources
  
Perform model evaluation, validation, and performance tuning to ensure accuracy, reliability, and scalability
  
Implement dimensionality reduction and feature engineering techniques as required
  
  

Neural Networks, NLP & Computer Vision
  
Build and deploy neural network models using TensorFlow and Keras
  
Develop solutions leveraging Natural Language Processing (NLP) for text analysis, extraction, and understanding
  
Design and implement computer vision solutions using OpenCV for image and video‑based use cases
  
  

MLOps & Model Deployment
  
Lead ML model deployment to production environments with proper versioning and model registry management
  
Implement and maintain MLOps pipelines for continuous training, testing, deployment, and monitoring of models
  
Ensure reproducibility, observability, and lifecycle management of machine learning models
  
  

Cloud & Platform Engineering
  
Deploy and run machine learning workloads in containerized environments using Kubernetes
  
Ensure scalability, performance, and reliability of data science solutions in production
  
Collaborate with engineering teams to integrate ML solutions into enterprise systems
  
  

Generative & Advanced AI
  
Contribute to innovation initiatives involving Generative AI (GenAI) and Agentic AI
  
Explore and implement advanced AI techniques to enhance automation and intelligent decision‑making
  
  

Leadership & Collaboration
  
Provide technical leadership, code reviews, and mentoring to junior data scientists
  
Participate in solution design, architecture discussions, and technical reviews
  
Collaborate with product owners, business analysts, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into AI/ML solutions
  
Support production issues, model retraining, and continuous improvement initiatives
  
  

Required Skills & Experience
  
* Minimum 6 years of hands‑on experience in Data Science and Machine Learning
* Strong proficiency in Python
* Solid experience with Machine Learning algorithms and Predictive Modeling
* Hands‑on experience with Neural Networks (TensorFlow, Keras)
* Practical experience in MLOps, ML model deployment, and model registry concepts
* Strong background in data analysis, data wrangling, and model evaluation
* Experience with NLP and/or Computer Vision (OpenCV)
* Exposure to Kubernetes for deploying and managing ML workloads
* Good analytical, problem‑solving, and communication skills
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum delivery environments


Nice‑to‑Have Skills
  
* Hands‑on exposure to Generative AI (GenAI) or Agentic AI solutions
* Experience working with large‑scale datasets or big data environments
* Prior experience in consulting or client‑facing roles


Qualifications & Certifications
  
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or related field
* Preferred certifications in:


o Data Science / Machine Learning
  
o Cloud or AI‑related certifications
  
About Infosys
  
Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 56 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through the many next of their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
TL;DR
  
We're rebuilding how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science, on top of LLMs and agents. We're hiring a senior platform engineer in Stockholm to own the systems behind it: GCP infra, CI/CD, observability, data pipelines, and the AI tooling our engineers use daily. Broad role, real ownership, small team.
  
The role
  
Alva runs as event-driven microservices on GCP. We ship product features on top of LLMs and agents, and our engineers use Claude Code daily. The scope is broad — nobody we hire will have done all of it. We're hiring for judgment and how fast you pick up the rest.
  
What we're looking for
  
  

You've operated production systems for several years and have opinions about how they should be built.
  
  

You think in failure modes. You ask what happens at 3 am before you ask what happens on the happy path.
  
  

You're effective with AI tools. You steer them, push back, and verify their output instead of trusting it.
  
  

You explain decisions clearly and change your mind when someone has a better argument.
  
  

If you've done most of the work below in some form, at any cloud, at any scale, we want to talk. A checklist match isn't required.
  
What you'll do
  
Some shipped, some in flight, some still on the drawing board — a sample of what the team owns:
  
  

Migrating our backend services from Kubernetes to Cloud Run, along with the Pub/Sub subscriptions.
  
  

Introducing pgbouncer in front of Postgres to scale past our replica cap.
  
  

Building a Backstage-style developer portal with an MCP layer — one source of truth for services, conventions, and architecture, for engineers and coding agents alike.
  
  

Scaffolding agentic features so product squads ship them without reinventing prompts, evals, and guardrails each time.
  
  

A protobuf schema registry and data contracts pipeline to fix the drift between services and BigQuery.
  
  

Enabling the data team — shared patterns and pipelines (dlt, BigQuery) that let analytics work scale alongside engineering.
  
  

How we work
  
We use Claude Code heavily. We ship product features on top of LLMs (Gemini API), agents, and tooling like Langfuse for evaluation. We want engineers who treat AI as a collaborator they steer, not a tool they trust blindly.
  
The platform team's work touches every other team. What you ship is visible across the company in days.
  
Logistics
  
  

**Location:** Stockholm, hybrid.
  
  

**Team:** Small platform team reporting to the platform lead.
  
  

**Stack:** Python, GCP (Cloud Run, GKE, Postgres, Firestore, Pub/Sub, BigQuery), Terraform, GraphQL/Apollo, dlt, Sentry, Gemini API, Langfuse.
  
  

Nice to have
  
None of these are required, but any one of them would let you carve out a specialty fast:
  
  

**Postgres depth:** query plans, indexing strategy, connection pooling.
  
  

**Agent scaffolding and AI tooling:** reusable patterns for prompts, evals, guardrails, MCP servers. Spec-driven approaches a plus.
  
  

**Distributed systems patterns:** rate limiting, backpressure, queue throttling, handling bursts in a Pub/Sub-heavy system.
  
  

**Observability depth:** distributed tracing, OpenTelemetry, performance profiling across services.
  
  

**Data engineering:** dlt, dbt, BigQuery modeling. Not our daily focus, but useful background.
  
  

Probably not the right fit if
  
  

You want a specialist role with one technology.
  
  

You prefer long design cycles and heavy process over shipping and iterating.
  
  

You'd rather not use AI tooling in your daily work.
  
  

Why Alva
  
At Alva Labs, we're rebuilding how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science. We're building an AI-first hiring system that helps companies define roles, assess candidates, and make better decisions.
  
We're a small, ambitious team building from Stockholm. We value ownership, velocity, and low-ego collaboration.
